name: Tim Ryan
subject: If we want to expand the Democratic Senate majority, we need to win Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XufP3goUMv1ZUHNDHqoawjgawRpBCSEDhkVmVnFkUMC7HOpX5gCur63pYPmnNBVE3fJuQfJpJcPV5PVTWVDVPcObK_WeyDKPakEmiTOnJ7C8MyWiSOLxaTeXLgog_g_88kc6gDjso7xOK6UnueoRbhWS0nVO1l5UwgctN_uUYZuBzwYu2ZLJYoOBLG_j7YekrCtw85TQjBAc8TJYnKiE5bLUyaqHbuavbEOWuk0vwADveSNKXuzowBST6-VQNwv2149sEX3zpndfmU-aa-6np1AtZVLPgNU2b8SGE2fT_N8ZiE_gbGUkhM2ZzxIMxmWfFWSqg0di1Orq_poXg2gq_mNMwo8c6U8fJz-V_FbqtWIJ/3g8/2zvJyo4rTRSwNimvZBoVDA/h0/isLjNX1TgO9vy60eluUNgaOoQytpEP_lNH9DXR1y4hY)
Derek, In a minute, I’ll ask you to split a critical donation between Common Good VA and my campaign to flip Ohio’s open Senate seat blue. **But first, let me explain why this race — and your donation — are so important today.**

Protecting our Democratic Senate majority is not enough. If we want to stop Mitch McConnell from abusing the filibuster, we must expand our Senate majority. And flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat is our best chance to do just that.

**A new poll shows this race in a dead heat. And Senator Sherrod Brown has endorsed our campaign because he knows we can win. Now all we need is you.**

[**Whether or not we can flip this seat depends on you. We need the resources right now — not next year — to build the team it’ll take to win. Will you split a donation of $15 or more to help us flip Ohio blue and expand the Democratic Senate majority?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XufP3goUMv1ZUHNDHqoawjjl9hR8d_9uvo6TQd722hUXYMrH2RULDEvcD9mm5TZkEtf-qSxER1KywwapjM_EKzOJQyBaaC4wQH_MQ5DRfc7vLN6SkssaokuQl8jqTZH0063fUDfTMauEGHeugmKMTrUzGq75psJg6SWqvNtQZ_Xm8vT3FeKZZ0L2rJNbio1iKqddbLHQkCOoBy63u4ObTAZhJVL9Dcx3y5hIX6mdUIBNHEfEqpEHCT9Do6eDKo_7qLl9FVq9-bcyHGAP_uEYHkTPXZ6RIvWJOWcMF_1lwqauwsQAR7NeB1bYp214jxri0tiQhB39RN_0nZa9hi-fgIfdiEOmFxreTagJiMZ_ZiGi/3g8/2zvJyo4rTRSwNimvZBoVDA/h1/pGmNqpy1u3gr5b1iugaQzSpbcymGQVCU-uRyXJCu8dA) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XufP3goUMv1ZUHNDHqoawjh3H2NbyhZ-5VDl1zXDBumptnrKix4d7w8jcFgXNSciV7M9tJLz3pZuQXbfrEzZHE8TevOLLSSqYQODtgxQZo3bV5jrdUdofvh13dcMz7DoKT5hGGuwdFUn0Re29otg9z1-Lvdkpm6FQWAsW381quYWQmRCaE4NI5ew_2kKBERvV1glG88XlfCHC6pBCnupH4DzZsaplg_0615jYge1UerLHJ_3alBX0RMpAYe4HldMOeb0_VeL20Bcl1_mB0TUPjfgAbj3aw0Cd7CjKhmyqSR4nEUzrS8CigE-3i2zJbRHNfs56Y8oDWPaEaY6eiwre2VyUBRFeDcfuR4BpMDSzeKE/3g8/2zvJyo4rTRSwNimvZBoVDA/h2/W7dx8vt-_c2AzVysUN-UYY_Z7ZBc93VOhoDFFJPNWrQ)
---
Donald Trump has made this race his top target. That’s why he attacked me during his first rally since losing the election. **It’s clear we’ve got the GOP running scared.**

Billionaire tech giant Peter Thiel has propped up JD Vance with a $10 million super PAC. And Josh Mandel is a dangerous Trump-wannabe with his own share of Twitter rants.

Me? I’ve been on picket lines and in union halls my whole life. I’m still paying off my family’s student loans and mortgage. I’m fighting like hell to cut workers in on the deal — not prop up my wealthy friends and right-wing special interests.

**Derek, I believe we can win this race._CNN_ ranks us as one of the most likely seats to flip. But this is on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive races of 2022. So, I’m turning to you:**

[**We’ll need a surge of grassroots support to take on the GOP and come out on top. Please, split a donation today between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us win this critical race. Anything you can chip in makes a difference.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XufP3goUMv1ZUHNDHqoawjgTi8Ml7uuFroLnQUsWHNW8GELB8Qude7dytvDTPFHXVrpIq9VJiUsRqY3weiRQWIaWaH4Y3OeyfM2O4j5Wy-HHtgVeOICZ5FSQLt2cSirvMC-wmr1mPH_V0PS4U6ZgAZI9xxKRrc2IWk4IHCbwB5r9noZHpmt6q8SQZ4OYWQm2B7OX-a2-I2TwbE7Lj3pu2kmeAyyMoE8NYTj9VVu70mBBZsg3IzFfS9NcuggyYxAjYUNd86bd1AAJoM1FhNHNzhJXa0kATiMSZUoRaNyI6p-qi8RPS0y_FEw6qPaB4KhQ08xNI-TApsyg36E5nmpXCJscgk911ejpbiBgakSOh0pF/3g8/2zvJyo4rTRSwNimvZBoVDA/h3/p8yyJ046fcAIwbdLrEjdyp4ejKz4WFjiidegoPVQJ7U)

| Socialist policies like “wealth redistribution” and “central planning” have gained a solid foothold in Idaho. Idahoans need a governor that will stand firm in the face of federal tyranny and uphold the values that made America great.
---

| |

| Principles above politics
---

| | |

| |

## **We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets,_growth in the size of government_. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.**

It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It’s time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. [Read Full Idaho Income Tax Policy Summary here.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNzk4MTk1OTM5ODM2NDM0ODgxJmM9djBqNyZlPTAmYj03NTk2Nzk0MDAmZD11NHk5aDNi.OYabxZjtdAfmdOpSv6fjKG8sDK7vA26u1cIIh2R_J8o)

| We can't say we "Back the Blue" and at the same time ignore what law enforcement is telling us. If we decriminalize drugs and promote homelessness, then we'll be like every other failed state. Cops will be the champions in the cause against corruption, we just need to give them the mandate and the tools to tackle it.

Only a bold vision will bring unity and cooperation to the Republican Party in Idaho! We need fresh blood at the top of the GOP ticket to inject some enthusiasm into our cause and grow the party. Thank you to the Twin Falls County Republicans for hosting me tonight.

| If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow **Patriots.** Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can’t volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: That’s a lot of cash
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! |
---
Fellow American,

I'm personally reaching out to you today with both _good news and bad news._

The good news is that in the final 5 weeks of the 3rd quarter - versus the full 12 weeks other campaigns had, with the help of grassroots conservatives, we were able to raise $3.75 MILLION. **[We couldn't have done it without your support, so THANK YOU!](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=effd96a824234fbc8f5320a4aa798e5a&_e=D9hWteCtBPXEZhvjhM8MD55zrZ9FgkwwmYevq-uQJha3SzXLtm_bEUpY0dPCTuZAN7BwNRFgnpZ2Zv4hbQvCkWDBi6Juhy2Yma_Fqzy8XexPLF1b21rA1twFrYIeBjqfGrUTEShXfPeAqNeHOsjsQPKMAbAltSydRb1ewmzaXjH4ttPDS-1FuCj9Tzdtmf8-6JDKTeCu0n7CxaHp4j34ZTAhIKU7ijRU0gxZN4Bj9bAW2jxJoXjdR3YkjKGjoK4vSOcoIxzI0GybV5vle7AaLbvqUIOAhi5-yeU4sDW2m_jkrTYcSZANFrcsRuDDcI2I0YjrlI-w6-1rz99DUQUtT5bLVEEU7-s7hFyodvvY_749r44j6sKS70tqPZJrrPzYa9ejL4caWp6y325mvLkF85op6V45hFWM6xkdXkswTrhiPZTQ_1PVikHl-O-8ZaL2lm3zVibt0JGCEuN10Ooqx2XspaVAK99SfgmZ2CdGpMU%3D)**

The bad news is the Democrat senator in Georgia just released his fundraising numbers: **$9.5 MILLION in the last three months.**

The good news is that in the final 5 weeks of the 3rd quarter - versus the full 12 weeks other campaigns had, with the help of grassroots conservatives, we were able to raise $3.75 MILLION. The bad news is the Democrat senator in Georgia just released his fundraising numbers: $9.5 MILLION in the last three months. And he already has $17.2 million in his campaign war chest! National Democrats are rallying behind Senator Warnock's campaign because they know Georgia WILL DECIDE the Senate majority in the upcoming election. Fellow American, we're facing the top funded Democrat in the country - so we can't afford to let our foot off the gas for a single day. name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: We’ve got to bring Law and Order back to America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
Are you with me?
_Sponsored message_
Are you with me?

| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9c4v5373jmo4iardlq817ji1dklaab4sv4470f8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o75c9h2bs)
---

Folks,

Sometimes America looks more like a saloon in the Wild West when I turn on the news than Atlanta, New York, or Portland where they’re filming.

I think it’s because the Wild West maybe had just about as much law and order as these Democrat-run cities do now, and it’s sad. It’s just sad to see some of the greatest cities in America looted and burned to the ground because these Radical mayors think it’s “not right” to hold people accountable for their actions.
| [DONATE NOW TO HOLD THE LEFT ACCOUNTABLE](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjtn5ecmkav7ovgk2hiaep1ht30c3ugcjnq9644o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o75c9h2bs)
---

Not to be too blunt, but if we don’t Take Back the Senate Majority soon, America’s going to look more like the Mad Max movie set than the most beautiful nation on earth. So, can I count on your donation, whatever it may be, to keep America beautiful and crime-free?

name: Parents Defending Education
subject: Teachers' unions are out of control
body:
Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the targ
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z06murge8ah1855eh13acmc52h0b946tkl0rl8n8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6dj5e5o79pbgethj1objeph66tb36dhmas9lm1qe1chmmqqm1d5k64om8s32murt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eaq6cdb0mmp6fdr2coqe1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpgm2or1c3h64oh5u)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6mh8ekvnht7ugmqeog7g54pgdh6r9ij2mru6h08_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o72c9h2bs) Fellow American, Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the target of a lawsuit from the National Education Association (NEA) — the largest teachers’ union in the country — just for asking questions. After enrolling her daughter in kindergarten, this mom asked the principal for more information about the curriculum. **She wanted to know what would be taught about Critical Race Theory (CRT) and gender identity.** The response? This Rhode Island mom says she was told to file public records (FOIA) requests to get the information she wanted. She filed FOIA requests ... **_and now a lawsuit from the NEA has followed._** **Teachers’ unions shouldn’t bully, intimidate, or silence concerned parents, community members, or groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) that want to improve their kids’ education. ** **[If you agree, please click here to sign the declaration right now -- and join over 50,000 concerned parents and taxpayers who are standing up for a healthy, non-politicized education for our kids.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztru79upmducq68kvhohrnb8mpbvvqudr08n1n50_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o72c9h2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqdk2q4bt1leorifutg6gujg74mn10shadev5gi8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o72c9h2bs) Parents Defending Education is a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas. Through network and coalition building, investigative reporting, litigation, and engagement on local, state, and national policies, we are fighting for the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. **Right now, teachers’ unions are a major roadblock to making that vision a reality, and it’s time for parents to start wielding the enormous power we possess to reclaim our schools.** [**You can take the first step right now by signing this national declaration.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpd21ho1kbo3cqomm8mdjp7cta4qggmfrcnem1v8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o72c9h2bs) You and I both know there are many thousands of outstanding teachers across the country who work hard every day to educate students and put them on a path to lifelong success. They’re the teachers who inspire your kids’ love of reading ... or spark an interest in science that leads them to a rewarding career ... or provide the mentorship and support that changes their lives. But too often this year, you and I have seen teachers’ unions put politics ahead of students and classroom learning — and lash out against parents and groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) for our involvement in our kids’ educations. At PDE, we’ve experienced this firsthand. This summer, the NEA passed a resolution at its annual conference to allocate more than $50,000 to “research” groups like Parents Defending Education. And although they used the word “research,” they really mean “investigate and smear.” If they thought this “cancel culture” tactic would intimidate us — they were wrong. We’re more committed than ever to defending a healthy, non-political education for all students. **[If you stand with PDE, as I believe you do, please add your name to this declaration to stand with students, parents, and classroom teachers over the political interests of teachers’ unions.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5va3dgre1buqaujvhfo3v5mgn4plv8mrj93ij2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o72c9h2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcac9oe77uat7a2oii6adlaa0u5jdeq7qcb6nmj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o72c9h2bs) Thank you for your support. Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2erkkgspf5td3ugl7ht3o12kvijnjifleen7458_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o72c9h2bs) | [](twitterhttps://twitter.com/defendinged?lang=en) | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z61dg7k3dssn4onq3utqio0fs21tu9rru18jhup0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o72c9h2bs) | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjsmmt6a8blbqp60hj09ah2veg8qg83ebm062500_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o72c9h2bs) | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdi0u71ed4nm9h635ahf41q7k8dege212boomgtg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o72c9h2bs)

name: American Defense News
subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z32qf9d79k2drq2vhagssm5gbi82d33nj2cgsugg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr30tph69grbd33mtinfcbgcdgncc3mmqrb2cdic4p38dhimth72ohlmhomasb0cv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imhj3ao5lm9jreo36epgb4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6c5gm6ob0s3ge49fg)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjqhlirb0823l6240pbi42qffa5sem6paisaukd0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o70s3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgqo84goo0c3igfusi0eo0mfjr3r6dm4ecsus5fg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o70s3h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za60bjfsv1inmirtlfdo3cu46nr42kqtbop7fup8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o70s3h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrjuig047bjik696rmq0nrlb0ag3v4s6q7omtem0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o74cdh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd6ikbc9t15fj784no909r70aa7spkqfiulsfmf8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o74cdh2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqoigvu5ga9jeb3fbbfbjg8lss4289e9caa02i4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o74cdh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4suf0qlm7dej838fjef9buu7eajdjdu5bt532bg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o74cdh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znv1i4aal1aoiel1lib4qoopukr2ni9b3j9jele8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o74cdh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn2e4m9mt2jmrovtqm8m5esfvt8hdcquskmdsf4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5hm2o74cdh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs3gqtqc0n759t043k4qdu2qlm09taighjainb7o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9jle8r7ccjkm1on9dtjmppq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuju1df34kqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr69bls2on2s3isujqact4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf8pnm9qrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprf972u9hf4d9jc2p64t3me5r7csb669h31d9me9qb9dj4cdrm7cb3c8oe0odjm5gm8orge3h238h1e8he4933cpgm2or1c3i66oh5u)

name: PACT - Parents Against Critical Theory
subject: WARNING: FBI Watch list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parents Against Critical Theory
body:
The Department of Justice (DOJ) is coming after us.

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58547850:6BEGaH2oN:m:1:3253819041:7365BDB1F75D85820E336F9B31A93522:r)
---
Peter,

The Department of Justice (DOJ) has declared war on us.

**[The Department of Justice will be investigating groups like Parents Against Critical Theory (PACT) for being "DOMESTIC TERRORISTS". > >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58547850:6BEGaH2oN:m:1:3253819041:7365BDB1F75D85820E336F9B31A93522:r)**

**Joe Biden and his administration are trying to silence concerned parents by weaponizing the Department of Justice against us.**

_The leftists have control over Hollywood, higher education, and the news. If we let them brainwash our children with progressive propaganda, America will cease to be America._

**Here are some pictures from a Parents Against Critical Theory (PACT) rally - do these people look like _" DOMESTIC TERRORISTS"_ to you?**

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58547850:6BEGaH2oN:m:1:3253819041:7365BDB1F75D85820E336F9B31A93522:r)
**[Please DONATE NOW to stand with Parents Against Critical Theory as we FIGHT BACK against those who would silence us. We can't do it without grassroots supporters like YOU! > >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58547850:6BEGaH2oN:m:1:3253819041:7365BDB1F75D85820E336F9B31A93522:r)**

**Critical Race Theory teaches that "whiteness" is evil, that parents are "dissenters," and that ALL white people are oppressors.**

The Left might've gone off the rails, but we can't let them drag our children down with them.

This is more important than any single election. Parents Against Critical Theory will not rest until CRT has been COMPLETELY defeated.

**But we need your help, Peter.** As we like to say, _" We're so grassroots, we need our grass-cut!"_ We truly do rely on the generosity of American Patriots like YOU.

Will you join us and fight for objective curriculum in our children's schools?

**[DONATE HERE to help us fight back against CRT> >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58547850:6BEGaH2oN:m:1:3253819041:7365BDB1F75D85820E336F9B31A93522:r)**

| Brad Little Puts Republicans Asleep and Drives Away the Youth
---
---
| |
---
| Tonight at the multi-county GOP event in Rexburg, Idaho we witnessed **the worst speech in the history of political speeches**. Imagine hearing "it's all good here folks" in 20,000 words. If we continue on this path then we will see the GOP die out. _No young person will ever join a party that is led by a man who has no vision and no energy. _ I'd offer up a summary of his remarks but I already have and _THAT is exactly the problem._ Please, if you love this state and you want to preserve it's future for your children and grandchildren, then **do NOT support generational politicians who have no vision and offer no inspiration to the rising generation. ** Imagine having someone at the top of the ticket who inspired people, someone who could articulate a bold vision with a message that spreads organically. We've already tried the professional politician approach, **_let's try the Patriot approach now._**

Right now polls are tied, and one recent poll even shows Youngkin ahead! With so much on the line, that’s not good enough, Derek. That’s why I’m asking for your help.

**_[Will you join us today by chipping in any amount to my campaign? clean_body: Let’s make this Sunday our best yet | | | = | | It’s deadline day, Derek, and we need to hit tonight’s goal. That’s why I’m launching a one-day donation match opportunity, expiring at midnight. = Thank you! I’m so excited to hit the campaign trail with Stacey Abrams today, Derek. Stacey is in Virginia because she knows how much is riding on us defeating Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump this November. The truth is, the more Glenn Youngkin doubles down on attacking our democracy, the harder we need to fight. Right now polls are tied, and one recent poll even shows Youngkin ahead! With so much on the line, that’s not good enough, Derek. That’s why I’m asking for your help. = I’ve got to get going because I have a lot of stops to make around Virginia today, but I hope I can count on you to help me defend democracy and keep Virginia blue today. Let’s hit this $1,000,000 goal! Thanks, – Terry | = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

**1,017 votes.** That was the margin in Maggie's U.S. Senate election in New Hampshire in 2016. **Now Maggie is up for re-election in 2022, and you better believe Mitch McConnell can count to 1,017.** Because if we lose just one seat, McConnell will retake that gavel and grind the Senate to a complete halt until the next presidential election. **[So right now I need you to defend our Senate majority by making a donation to Maggie's campaign →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37624706/311924845/-214106137?refcode=e20211017-jo-oct&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTExODcyMy00ZTJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3V6Hc2079Mg_Ky3q81TzLu3F2odnA__XEZZqp5HjU8k=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37624708/311924847/-214106137?refcode=e20211017-jo-oct&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTExODcyMy00ZTJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3V6Hc2079Mg_Ky3q81TzLu3F2odnA__XEZZqp5HjU8k=)

Maggie has been a leader in the fight to address the climate crisis, make college more affordable, protect a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions, tackle the opioid crisis, and build an economy that works for everyone.
But McConnell will stop climate action in its tracks. He’ll stop student loan debt relief. He’ll block judges who will uphold women's reproductive rights. And he’ll protect a corrupt tax system that funnels wealth to special interests.
**Winning a Senate election means investing early. It means investing in organizing and community mobilization over many months. It means having resources and infrastructure to combat the inevitable GOP onslaught of misinformation and attacks.**
_Because they’re coming. And we have to be ready._
**That’s why I’m asking you today, friend: Will you chip in right now to support Senator Maggie Hassan’s re-election campaign and keep Democrats in the majority?**

And he’ll protect a corrupt tax system that funnels wealth to special interests. Winning a Senate election means investing early. It means investing in organizing and community mobilization over many months. It means having resources and infrastructure to combat the inevitable GOP onslaught of misinformation and attacks. Because they’re coming. And we have to be ready. That’s why I’m asking you today, friend: Will you chip in right now to support Senator Maggie Hassan’s re-election campaign and keep Democrats in the majority? | = Thanks for helping Maggie out, Jon | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

| | Peter, We lost Ruth Bader Ginsberg a year ago. Now, overwhelmed by the Supreme Court's new conservative supermajority, too many Democrats are saying they wished RBG retired while Barack Obama was still president so that Obama could have nominated a liberal. The sad truth is, these Democrats seem to have already forgotten who Ruth Bader Ginsberg was. RBG fought until the end to defend _Roe v. Wade_ from right-wing assault. Her voice was instrumental to the fundamental SCOTUS protections that kept us safe during the autocratic Trump era. Let's not rewrite history, folks. RBG was right to keep fighting until _just_ too soon. 100% of the blame for today's SCOTUS lies with the Republican Party's longtime cynical power-crazed Senate Boss Mitch McConnell. Question: Who prevented Barack Obama from fairly replacing the late Antonin Scalia on the Court with voting rights leader Merrick Garland? Answer: Mitch McConnell. Question: Who is already gearing up to warp the Senate into a primarily single-issue chamber geared toward stonewalling the Biden-Harris administration's historic SCOTUS reform that will finally restore civility and nonpartisanship to the Judicial branch? Answer: Mitch McConnell. One more question for you Peter: Will you prove that progressives can see through McConnell's blatant attempt to oust the progressive Senators we elected to take back our razor-thin 50/50 Senate majority— like Raphael Warnock, Jon Ossoff, and Mark Kelly— and help When Democrats Turn Out as we redouble our digital and ground campaign to protect Ruth Bader Ginsberg's legacy? name: Adam Schiff
subject: It’s up to us
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
It’s abundantly clear, the GOP is successfully making the early investments needed to win back the House and Senate. The question is, how will Democrats respond? |
#
Derek, This past Friday, every federal campaign in the country reported their fundraising numbers from the last three months to the FEC in a public report. The RNC outraised Democrats **by over $10 million** during the second quarter of this year. And the results from last quarter just released show the **GOP raised $25.8 million** , giving them a $65 million cash on hand advantage — that’s nearly triple the amount they had in 2019 before the 2020 election. Meanwhile, Donald Trump is fundraising like he never stopped running for president and has over $100 million campaign war chest. And now, he’s hosting presidential campaign-style rallies while encouraging his supporters to donate money for his Big Lie lawsuits. All the while, House and Senate Republicans are raking in money from big-money donors to put Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy in control of Congress. We can’t lose the House or Senate and give them back control. We just can't. Too much is at stake. It’s abundantly clear, the GOP is making early investments in their effort to win back the House and Senate. The question is, how will Democrats respond? **If I have anything to say about it, we will fight back and beat them. Let's show Trump and the GOP that the American people will stand up to their falsehoods and conspiracy theories. It's up to us — so please, chip in $10 or $25 or any amount you can afford. In 2020, Democrats turned out in droves to defeat Donald Trump and send President Biden to the White House. After four long years of destructive policies, it was abundantly clear that voters wanted elected officials who believe in science, voting protections, reproductive rights, climate solutions, affordable healthcare, and so much more.
With the midterm elections around the corner, it’s critical we elect new and incumbent Democrats in the House and Senate. It’s imperative we increase our majority in the Senate, abolish the filibuster and uphold our democracy. Let’s get it done.
Thank you for all that you do.
— Adam

clean_body: It’s abundantly clear, the GOP is successfully making the early investments needed to win back the House and Senate. The question is, how will Democrats respond? | Derek, This past Friday, every federal campaign in the country reported their fundraising numbers from the last three months to the FEC in a public report. The RNC outraised Democrats by over $10 million during the second quarter of this year. And the results from last quarter just released show the GOP raised $25.8 million , giving them a $65 million cash on hand advantage — that’s nearly triple the amount they had in 2019 before the 2020 election. Meanwhile, Donald Trump is fundraising like he never stopped running for president and has over $100 million campaign war chest. And now, he’s hosting presidential campaign-style rallies while encouraging his supporters to donate money for his Big Lie lawsuits. All the while, House and Senate Republicans are raking in money from big-money donors to put Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy in control of Congress. We can’t lose the House or Senate and give them back control. We just can't. Too much is at stake. It’s abundantly clear, the GOP is making early investments in their effort to win back the House and Senate. The question is, how will Democrats respond? If I have anything to say about it, we will fight back and beat them. Let's show Trump and the GOP that the American people will stand up to their falsehoods and conspiracy theories. It's up to us — so please, chip in $10 or $25 or any amount you can afford. It will make a big difference in this fight. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = In 2020, Democrats turned out in droves to defeat Donald Trump and send President Biden to the White House. After four long years of destructive policies, it was abundantly clear that voters wanted elected officials who believe in science, voting protections, reproductive rights, climate solutions, affordable healthcare, and so much more. With the midterm elections around the corner, it’s critical we elect new and incumbent Democrats in the House and Senate. It’s imperative we increase our majority in the Senate, abolish the filibuster and uphold our democracy. Let’s get it done. Thank you for all that you do. — Adam Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrh60t7q9i23mshnnulhmii8d220ljplqrnfds5g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5ge8o32chh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg6l79qeasvc2lcc71bnv1nkt790docvhdf1kl1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5ge8o32chh2bs) [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlc1ditfeb21j2bvkktta7t4vjpqd5c5jj94ga8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5ge8o32chh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z57r8rpb028jrhlaee1p9r2h1u9eq46fi03bfv68_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5ge8o32chh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdansgoj3vo14g4gck3lj9ag44jlr8duibaj483g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5ge8o32chh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd5hajgjnb7rlb8k2adl9d76mfla4r74rl1anqc0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5ge8o32chh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhev30vcn23s1jo6d0a129tsglova7ln0fankdf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5ge8o32chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Gov. DeSantis has failed Florida in every possible way. He’s:
* Signed a sweeping voter suppression bill into law.
* Opened pop-up COVID-19 vaccine sites in rich Florida neighborhoods full of his political donors.
* Jet-setted across America on a fundraising tour while the Delta variant sickened and killed Floridians.
* Banned mask requirements in schools and threatened to withhold pay from officials who’ve implemented them.
* Urged the U.S. Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade.
* Signed laws restricting abortion access.
* Said he might support an abortion ban like the one in Texas.
* Refused to accept that climate change is an existential threat to our state.
* Failed to prepare Florida’s coastal communities for rising sea levels and stronger hurricanes.
* Ignored the “red tide” algae bloom that’s scaring off tourists.

... and this isn’t even a comprehensive list of his failures!

**One thing is clear: Gov. DeSantis doesn’t care about Floridians. He only cares about his presidential ambitions and satisfying his wealthy donors.**

**[We _don’t_ support Gov. DeSantis, and we know you don’t either. clean_body: | = Friends — we’ll be blunt. We fell short of our $100,000 mid-month goal, meaning we’re going to have to take a hard look at our budget and make some adjustments over the next few weeks. However, if everyone reading this email right now chipped in as little as $10 today, we’d close the fundraising gap in no time. That’s why today we’re asking: Will you rush a $10 contribution to Defend the Senate right now? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We’re on the front lines in battleground states across the country, fighting to protect incumbents like Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada and Raphael Warnock in Georgia. But we can’t do it alone — and closing this budget gap immediately is crucial to our success down the line. So we’re relying on grassroots support to power our efforts to defend our fragile Democratic Senate majority. Thanks so much for being a part of this team, Defend the Senate Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. SMP 700 13th St NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States

| | |
---
| What I Believe:
---
I have done everything I set out to do. I have shown good people that they have a better option. Come the 2022 election, we will no longer have to "hold our nose" to vote. Come the 2022 election, we will not be so desperate that we must put all of our "eggs into a damaged basket." Money, in this race, is very important, I have raised quite a bit of it. But money, alone, can't buy an election. We learned that from Hillary Clinton.
I am a private citizen. I am no different from you. I am a private citizen, who walked out and said, "I believe we can do better."
I'm not riding anyone's coattails. I'm not pulling my power from any other man or woman. By the grace of God and some really motivated Americans, who love their country, I have outraised and out polled the others.
I was not given a list of high dollar donors and told to sit in a room with a phone. I've been among you the entire time. We are up to about 900 miles a week going across our great state.
I have proven what I've set out to do. I can win! I can win not just the Primary, but I believe I'm the only Republican candidate who can win the General election against these "regressive" Leftists.
But, I can't do it alone. I need you!!! I need each of you:

* To [donate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BrGgSJHZvqdKcmG5zZ_BQtz6_pV3BlEbaex_awOoE8lC_YimVOazl9oRi-0GM69Y_UlNktorPaqM28gfCFPSak1avR-jpteuP8tk7EjXefm-nzozxNZ_UNkv7CvWvWum2oIXl31ePzoMP8XEq4ii7eFxzJa-XQVOSjHzLQYYc20z7tNe8NM95Q==&c=H7gJiR0L8lqPyG22HHaHxaJeWasHsLy2hxXP5z9na_jXd3nqSt1hmQ==&ch=Sg10k391aTwFhUpfF-FMrVw9rN_TThIAOwP5K8tFIPzIYWlYJ_pZnA==)
* To volunteer
* To host Meet & Greets
* To host fundraisers (my team can help you with this)
* To share my content
* To email me a list of people you believe are influential and I need to know.

No one is going to hand our country back to us. Most of our leaders are too busy worrying about getting to the next rung on the political ladder for themselves. Our help is NOT going to come from the top down. It will come from us being sick and tired of being sick and tired and demanding better.
We EACH have a part to play in this. Get engaged BEFORE it's too late. Jump in NOW with both feet. ~ Blessings
---

---

---
| | |
---
| One of many epitomes I've had on this journey:
---
I arrived home late from an event earlier this week and as is his routine my hubby stayed up waiting for me. We soon after retired for the night and as is her routine, my baby girl tiptoed in and laid down in my arms. So, there I was sandwiched between my husband and my daughter and I had the clearest thought: "THIS, right here, is what's real."
Life is busy. We are out here trying to save our country, or make our mark, or just survive. But, at the end of the day family is THE greatest blessing we've been given. Be kind to them. Spend time with them. Hold them while you can. ~Blessings...

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: There are only 2 LGBTQ members of the U.S. Senate. Let that sink in.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Right now, there are only 2 LGBTQ members of the U.S. Senate. Let that sink in.
In fact, no openly LGBTQ man has ever been elected to the upper house of the United States Congress.
Just like Pennsylvania has _never_ elected a single person of color to the chamber.
But if we’re going to change all of that by electing Malcolm Kenyatta as Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator, we’ve got to have an honest conversation about fundraising.
**Here’s the simple truth: Fundraising is one of the most important parts of running for office — and white men consistently dominate the game.**
A 2020 report on race and gender in campaign finance published by OpenSecrets found that people of color are still at a huge disadvantage when it comes to campaign fundraising.
[If you're ready to help us change that, please make a $3 donation to our campaign today. We have an incredible opportunity to make history by electing Malcolm, but it will require all of us to play a part.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37634831/311956514/-360183459?refcode2=8fa3d582-632f-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211017-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmEzZDU4Mi02MzJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XOiqbcipB2z0keUfOpUyJBUUBjdgRAbJ_hfhSafHezI=)
Time is up for the naysayers and gatekeepers who have kept people of color, LGBTQ folks, and working folks from sitting at the table.
Thanks to the help of outstanding supporters like you, we’ve built a coalition of working folks that includes people from every single one of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties and all 50 states.
So the fact of the matter is this is a race Malcolm can win, but it’s going to take all of us doing our part to build our winning coalition even bigger.
[Will you please consider making a $3 to Malcolm’s historic campaign today? It’s not easy being a trailblazer, but with enough folks chipping in a few bucks at a time, we know we have what it takes to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37634832/311956515/-360183459?refcode2=8fa3d582-632f-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211017-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmEzZDU4Mi02MzJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XOiqbcipB2z0keUfOpUyJBUUBjdgRAbJ_hfhSafHezI=)
Together, we can overcome any obstacle we face and finally give working people the champion we deserve in Washington.
When Malcolm is elected as Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator, we hope you’ll take a moment and feel really good about the decision you made to give today.
Thank you,
Team Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC
---
Malcolm PAC
PO Box 22395
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, [click here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/8da3d582-632f-ec11-981f-c896653b9208/8fa3d582-632f-ec11-981f-c896653b9208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmEzZDU4Mi02MzJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XOiqbcipB2z0keUfOpUyJBUUBjdgRAbJ_hfhSafHezI=&id=120380453) to unsubscribe. Last week, we saw — as plain as day — what Donald Trump’s six-time endorsement of Glenn Youngkin really means.

And we saw Trump’s rally attendees pledge their allegiance to a flag that was used at the deadly riot on January 6.

I can’t overstate how dangerous a Youngkin governorship would be, Derek.

**But I have to be blunt. After everything we saw last week,_I’m stunned that more members of our grassroots team aren’t stepping up and donating right now._**

Look, our democracy is literally on the line, and right now, Donald Trump’s handpicked guy has a real shot to win.

Don’t let it happen.

Thank you for taking this seriously,

Friend, It was Community College Professor Dr. Jill Biden versus racist, anti-democracy charlatan Steve Bannon. They rallied two days apart, in the same critical county, represented by H.S. History & Government teacher Delegate Schuyler VanValkenburg. Now, all eyes are on what happens in Henrico county. Will Bannon and his coup-attempting, Trump-supporting, conspiracy theory-peddling activists propel Republicans to victory and defeat a local teacher? Or will Dr. Biden and Del. The difference between these two is extraordinary:
Dr. Biden has said "Teaching isn't just what I do. It's who I am."
Steve Bannon, well, we hesitate to even write the awful things he's said about women, public school teachers, college students, and anyone with compassion for other people.
At the Bannon-Trump rally, the audience pledged allegiance to a flag flown in the January 6th coup attempt. In schools all over America tomorrow, millions of students will pledge allegiance to a flag that stands for liberty and justice for all.
We're committed to protecting that promise of liberty and justice for all. Re-electing a teacher like Schuyler VanValkenburg, and ensuring he's joined by more educators in a Democratic majority, is the best way we can combat the dangerous actions of Steve Bannon, Donald Trump, and their ilk.
**_[Join us and ruin Steve Bannon's day.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37635289/311958307/1983039413?refcode=email_fr_20211017-bidenbannon_E3_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY2YTQwNjYzLTY0MmYtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t1xPWBiihmpTDXVnek_UejeYzDWnYeJoCzbD4cUkOCI=)_**

Hey friends,
The 2020 election was almost exactly a year ago, but the Big Lie is very much alive and well and worming its way into the 2022 midterms.
Just a few days ago, Trump himself proclaimed that “ _If we don’t solve the Presidential Election Fraud of 2020. . . Republicans will not be voting in ’22 or ’24. It is the single most important thing for Republicans to do._ ”
**Look, folks, the _only reason_ that the Big Lie is still a menace to our democracy is because of Republicans like Scott Franklin who voted to overturn a free and fair democratic election.**
[_**Let’s make sure that Franklin feels the consequences of his attempt to disenfranchise 81+ million voters.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37635594/311960565/810955667?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211016biglie_EG_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWE3MDYyMC02NzJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0P6GNwtrSpZwkcATetCreuBjz2v_adaTOVPTfkKUpU=)

Even worse, it’s not like House GOP members are owning up to their catastrophic decision to support Trump’s lies — they’re doubling down. Last weekend, Steve Scalise, the #2 Republican in the House, refused to say that the 2020 election was legitimate. And Scott Franklin’s silence speaks for itself.
**The people spreading these lies are gutless, and are actively putting our democracy on the brink of something we really don’t want to even imagine.**
Protecting our democracy — the very core of who we are as a country — should be the _absolute bare minimum_ we expect from our elected representatives. clean_body: The 2020 election was almost exactly a year ago, but the Big Lie is very much alive and well and worming its way into the 2022 midterms. | | = Hey friends, The 2020 election was almost exactly a year ago, but the Big Lie is very much alive and well and worming its way into the 2022 midterms. Just a few days ago, Trump himself proclaimed that “ If we don’t solve the Presidential Election Fraud of 2020. . . Republicans will not be voting in ’22 or ’24. It is the single most important thing for Republicans to do. ” Look, folks, the only reason that the Big Lie is still a menace to our democracy is because of Republicans like Scott Franklin who voted to overturn a free and fair democratic election. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Even worse, it’s not like House GOP members are owning up to their catastrophic decision to support Trump’s lies — they’re doubling down. Last weekend, Steve Scalise, the #2 Republican in the House, refused to say that the 2020 election was legitimate. And Scott Franklin’s silence speaks for itself. The people spreading these lies are gutless, and are actively putting our democracy on the brink of something we really don’t want to even imagine. Protecting our democracy — the very core of who we are as a country — should be the absolute bare minimum we expect from our elected representatives. Scott Franklin has utterly failed us on that count. The people of FL-15 deserve better. Our parents and friends who live here deserve better. Hell, the entire country deserves better. = = = — Eddie | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37635726/311961030/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGU4YzY3Zi02NzJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bAli75xdZSy77TqMjPSUQBeJpSLI0n1RRw8Ju4NdyjA=)
---
Hey Peter, I’m Mark Takano and I’m proudly Japanese-American.

Like many Americans, my family pursued the American Dream. Eventually, they were successful. But, there was no shortage of obstacles.

Painfully, my grandparents and parents were all sent to Japanese internment camps during World War II because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost everything and had no choice but to rebuild their entire lives after the war.

**But now, I’m a U.S. Congressman, honored to represent CA-41 in Congress -- and I’m asking for your support.**

American families like mine have come so far due to progressive and inclusive policies. And I’m working everyday in Congress to keep fighting for policies that further uplift and protect our diverse communities. [**But Peter, I can’t do it without your support -- so can I count on you to chip in $3 right now and help me build an America that is welcoming and prosperous for all families? I need your help! »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37635727/311961032/232128462?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20211017_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGU4YzY3Zi02NzJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bAli75xdZSy77TqMjPSUQBeJpSLI0n1RRw8Ju4NdyjA=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37635736/311961041/232128462?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20211017_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGU4YzY3Zi02NzJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bAli75xdZSy77TqMjPSUQBeJpSLI0n1RRw8Ju4NdyjA=)

name: Gwen Moore
subject: Political oppression
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Once again, Wisconsin is the bellwether for the 2022 election. President Donald Trump's false claims of election fraud are gaslighting similar efforts to relitigate the 2020 presidential election, including Wisconsin...something that's already been done.
And if that weren't bad enough, the Republican-controlled State Senate and State Legislature redrew and tilted state legislative and congressional district maps in 2011. It's the gift that keeps on giving for Wisconsin Republicans because ten years later, many minority voters are even more disenfranchised.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ttyKEVxSPzcFKOlQgWr_7BAOYeswKPQ2_ZNWADIHlIM=/mltjOfMJQTbhd99cvOvtubWI2u5Fif_-vOat0E6LGLI=?refcode=101521)
Sisters and Brothers, these tactics aren't political gamesmanship; **THESE TACTICS ARE PARTISAN POLITICAL OPPRESSION.** Using spurious election fraud claims provides cover fire for the Republican effort to suppress voting rights and redraw districts that purposely subjugate minority voters.
There is no more prominent example of what these tactics do. Minorities die of COVID at a much higher rate than whites because they aren't represented by people who care. They are being represented by people who push sham elections and gerrymander districts. [_**This is why I need your help.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ttyKEVxSPzcFKOlQgWr_7BAOYeswKPQ2_ZNWADIHlIM=/mltjOfMJQTbhd99cvOvtubWI2u5Fif_-vOat0E6LGLI=?refcode=101521)

clean_body: Once again, Wisconsin is the bellwether for the 2022 election. President Donald Trump's false claims of election fraud are gaslighting similar efforts to relitigate the 2020 presidential election, including Wisconsin...something that's already been done. And if that weren't bad enough, the Republican-controlled State Senate and State Legislature redrew and tilted state legislative and congressional district maps in 2011. It's the gift that keeps on giving for Wisconsin Republicans because ten years later, many minority voters are even more disenfranchised. Sisters and Brothers, these tactics aren't political gamesmanship; THESE TACTICS ARE PARTISAN POLITICAL OPPRESSION. Using spurious election fraud claims provides cover fire for the Republican effort to suppress voting rights and redraw districts that purposely subjugate minority voters. There is no more prominent example of what these tactics do. Minorities die of COVID at a much higher rate than whites because they aren't represented by people who care. They are being represented by people who push sham elections and gerrymander districts. name: Jan. 6 Update
subject: Trump supporters pledged allegiance to a Jan 6 flag
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGLazwEUQEXhlMZCo-ZjgJghCqhfXKIoj7LuQCgTFqhC9MOVzwKsmwNA251n2jb6wDepxvYeJhQm3EuZrEplFmlPsWfeJNVqmvcM-nOBCwAmmEYKWRLf5JLiJahnYwqo0-4hggm8o9REAzufLduTdkA1T0Ir5PYjqUZYh6nQa49jZo2fD-3zGaOUGKzZxvfeEOvy1xZFXKqfXQvOPmsUAzPNzrqnXuYfwfTJf_8eAAhE_GHr73iP52OD7fejs5N2XsLG8-LOJCY1hwzSVM7Tefk0_0ivKkg7s0UN4lTXAqAgaRijsTwzl35sz8xpNupBBqQOUcPGB6riQjBGSTHsfOj0/3g8/T97wARTYSdyJeVgMLjjHqg/h0/mHgImIyz3AEEEaT499fXqvLH8Zj9PbsPJCfx8SRiJKw)
This week, Trump and his supporters rallied in Virginia to support extreme, Trump-loving candidates like Glenn Youngkin.

How did they start off the rally? _**They pledged allegiance to a flag that was at the January 6th insurrection.**_

We all know what happened at the January 6th insurrection -- violent insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol, putting a bedrock principle of our Democracy -- the peaceful transfer of power -- at risk. They were inspired by Donald Trump’s lies and egged on by extremists like Ted Cruz.

Now Republicans are treating January 6 like some holy event -- pledging allegiance not to our country but to the idea of insurrection, fascism, and Trump’s “big lie.”

**[Do you think that someone who pledges allegiance to the January 6 insurrection shouldn’t be allowed to take office? Hey Peter — greetings from Chattanooga, stop #47 on our 95 County Tennessee Thrives Tour! It’s been such a joy and privilege to meet with Tennesseans in their home communities. For so long, working people and families have been ignored, but I believe — I know — that listening is what leadership is all about. [_**Will you pitch in $10 or $20 to help us cover costs like gas and lodging on this tour?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37636988/311968195/-103157484?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211017midmonth1rs_JM_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmEzZjhlNC02ZjJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4DsTbdGQBc_BHI_2R3hUB3C-E9RqNn0CsH7Y-xvENVk=) | [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37636990/311968197/-103157484?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211017midmonth1rs_JM_all_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmEzZjhlNC02ZjJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4DsTbdGQBc_BHI_2R3hUB3C-E9RqNn0CsH7Y-xvENVk=)
---
I've had the opportunity to share my Democratic values with folks across the state, values that I believe are also Tennessee values: hard work, volunteerism, lending your neighbor a helping hand.
And I've also listened as folks have shared back with me the issues they want addressed. One of the things that makes me most excited about our campaign is the resounding agreement between regular Tennesseans about the areas we must address immediately. The top three that I’ve heard again and again are:
* **Fully funding our public schools** : Education is the ultimate equalizer; by reinvesting in our public education system, we can ensure equal opportunity for all of our children.

* **Expanding Medicaid and access to affordable healthcare** : No one should ever have to make a choice between putting food on the table and paying their medical bills.

* **Equity in job growth and job creation** : We need to invest in our workforce and develop a 21st century economy that provides work and fair wages for all.

When this tour’s over, we’ll build out a full policy platform that gathers everything we’ve learned from in-person conversations, surveys, and meetings with voters. **Because I know that to serve as a governor for everyone who calls our great state home — no matter their background or zip code — I’ve got to listen to them.**
[_**We’ve still got more than 40 counties to reach, though, and we need your help. Will you join us on our mission to be a voice for ALL Tennesseans by supporting our listening tour?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37636992/311968199/862036749?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211017midmonth1rs_JM_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmEzZjhlNC02ZjJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4DsTbdGQBc_BHI_2R3hUB3C-E9RqNn0CsH7Y-xvENVk=)

clean_body: It’s been such a joy and privilege to meet with Tennesseans in their home communities. For so long, working people and families have been ignored, but I believe — I know — that listening is what leadership is all about. | = Hey Peter — greetings from Chattanooga, stop #47 on our 95 County Tennessee Thrives Tour! It’s been such a joy and privilege to meet with Tennesseans in their home communities. For so long, working people and families have been ignored, but I believe — I know — that listening is what leadership is all about. = | = I've had the opportunity to share my Democratic values with folks across the state, values that I believe are also Tennessee values: hard work, volunteerism, lending your neighbor a helping hand. And I've also listened as folks have shared back with me the issues they want addressed. One of the things that makes me most excited about our campaign is the resounding agreement between regular Tennesseans about the areas we must address immediately. The top three that I’ve heard again and again are: Fully funding our public schools : Education is the ultimate equalizer; by reinvesting in our public education system, we can ensure equal opportunity for all of our children. Expanding Medicaid and access to affordable healthcare : No one should ever have to make a choice between putting food on the table and paying their medical bills. Equity in job growth and job creation : We need to invest in our workforce and develop a 21st century economy that provides work and fair wages for all. When this tour’s over, we’ll build out a full policy platform that gathers everything we’ve learned from in-person conversations, surveys, and meetings with voters. Because I know that to serve as a governor for everyone who calls our great state home — no matter their background or zip code — I’ve got to listen to them.** = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = — Dr. Martin | Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee 1831 12th Avenue S #175 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Congressman Adam Schiff -- member of the House select committee investigating the January 6th insurrection -- just called Kevin McCarthy an "insurrectionist in a suit and tie."

**[We agree, but we want to get your take. Will you take our one-minute poll to let us know your honest thoughts on Kevin McCarthy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37637095/311968528/1874880298?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTYyMDU5OC03MDJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qa9yq0B5Q_myqzecK85DjjaMWSuiFKkwrziKHI4Hh94=&emci=38620598-702f-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=3a620598-702f-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=21170704)**

The only logical conclusion is that if Republicans take back the House next year, and he becomes Speaker, he'll do whatever Trump tells him to.

**We can stop him. Every minute McCarthy spends fighting off our campaign in his backyard is one less minute he has to help the Republicans retake the House.**

name: Parents Defending Education
subject: Don’t let teachers' unions bully you
body:
Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the targ
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcfjlqsl9s4nitiob2s1p2b30gn8fgvt1jvlc4v0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5iecor6cdh2bs) Fellow American, Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the target of a lawsuit from the National Education Association (NEA) — the largest teachers’ union in the country — just for asking questions. After enrolling her daughter in kindergarten, this mom asked the principal for more information about the curriculum. **She wanted to know what would be taught about Critical Race Theory (CRT) and gender identity.** The response? This Rhode Island mom says she was told to file public records (FOIA) requests to get the information she wanted. She filed FOIA requests ... **_and now a lawsuit from the NEA has followed._** **Teachers’ unions shouldn’t bully, intimidate, or silence concerned parents, community members, or groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) that want to improve their kids’ education. ** **[If you agree, please click here to sign the declaration right now -- and join over 50,000 concerned parents and taxpayers who are standing up for a healthy, non-politicized education for our kids.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z00ii8jkfvt8ohir8794ssvrms89s1roj2qgobkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5iecor6cdh2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjbvokpmtu390jg4kh0camtnmhrs2nhfjkcr41l8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5iecor6cdh2bs) Parents Defending Education is a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas. Through network and coalition building, investigative reporting, litigation, and engagement on local, state, and national policies, we are fighting for the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. **Right now, teachers’ unions are a major roadblock to making that vision a reality, and it’s time for parents to start wielding the enormous power we possess to reclaim our schools.** [**You can take the first step right now by signing this national declaration.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztt7hjs2c1l0uglvg3vj89eaq8jel94b7md98rdg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5iecor6cdh2bs) You and I both know there are many thousands of outstanding teachers across the country who work hard every day to educate students and put them on a path to lifelong success. They’re the teachers who inspire your kids’ love of reading ... or spark an interest in science that leads them to a rewarding career ... or provide the mentorship and support that changes their lives. But too often this year, you and I have seen teachers’ unions put politics ahead of students and classroom learning — and lash out against parents and groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) for our involvement in our kids’ educations. At PDE, we’ve experienced this firsthand. This summer, the NEA passed a resolution at its annual conference to allocate more than $50,000 to “research” groups like Parents Defending Education. And although they used the word “research,” they really mean “investigate and smear.” If they thought this “cancel culture” tactic would intimidate us — they were wrong. We’re more committed than ever to defending a healthy, non-political education for all students. **[If you stand with PDE, as I believe you do, please add your name to this declaration to stand with students, parents, and classroom teachers over the political interests of teachers’ unions.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztkpbbhuh9i1gbjvlshh2235dep2j3iev019b958_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5iecor6cdh2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9srm7ojt0gnc3f53fr1bsbnjguvsam02lfudqq0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5iecor6cdh2bs) Thank you for your support. Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjp3vv66rb72tano6idt4uu8973mch0vf3juie70_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5iecor6cdh2bs) | [](twitterhttps://twitter.com/defendinged?lang=en) | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z314esa79tdq110mq1jprmq9kbq81f868huvma10_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5iecor6cdh2bs) | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6tcpgl0h20nbkttpbbuka7nmdod682mjm1sudr0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5iecor6cdh2bs) | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3c42i69najaie1koqdm69mnqnfs1j2ik94ggbao_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5iecor6cdh2bs)

clean_body: Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the targ Sponsored message Fellow American, Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the target of a lawsuit from the National Education Association (NEA) — the largest teachers’ union in the country — just for asking questions. After enrolling her daughter in kindergarten, this mom asked the principal for more information about the curriculum. She wanted to know what would be taught about Critical Race Theory (CRT) and gender identity. The response? This Rhode Island mom says she was told to file public records (FOIA) requests to get the information she wanted. She filed FOIA requests ... and now a lawsuit from the NEA has followed. Teachers’ unions shouldn’t bully, intimidate, or silence concerned parents, community members, or groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) that want to improve their kids’ education. Parents Defending Education is a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas. Through network and coalition building, investigative reporting, litigation, and engagement on local, state, and national policies, we are fighting for the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. Right now, teachers’ unions are a major roadblock to making that vision a reality, and it’s time for parents to start wielding the enormous power we possess to reclaim our schools. You and I both know there are many thousands of outstanding teachers across the country who work hard every day to educate students and put them on a path to lifelong success. They’re the teachers who inspire your kids’ love of reading ... or spark an interest in science that leads them to a rewarding career ... or provide the mentorship and support that changes their lives. But too often this year, you and I have seen teachers’ unions put politics ahead of students and classroom learning — and lash out against parents and groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) for our involvement in our kids’ educations. At PDE, we’ve experienced this firsthand. This summer, the NEA passed a resolution at its annual conference to allocate more than $50,000 to “research” groups like Parents Defending Education. And although they used the word “research,” they really mean “investigate and smear.” If they thought this “cancel culture” tactic would intimidate us — they were wrong. We’re more committed than ever to defending a healthy, non-political education for all students. Thank you for your support. Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education | | | twitter | | | ---|---|---|---|--- 4532 Lee Hwy #119 Arlington VA 22207 Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Can you please sign my petition urging Congress to take action on climate change — including water recycling, resilience, desalination and more? This issue is so important to Arizona, and to all of us.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make your voice heard on the issue of climate change and drought. First, let me explain why this request is so important:
We’re in the middle of what some climate scientists call a “megadrought.”
When you examine tree and soil data, it tells us that we’re in the middle of the worst drought in 1,200 years. The last time a drought lasted this long was in the 1500s, and we’ve already beat that record.
And if you ask scientists, they’ll tell you these drought conditions are made worse by the effects of climate change, rising temperatures, and reduced snow melt.
Last week, I chaired a bipartisan Senate hearing on the issue of drought in Western states. I’d called for this hearing because this issue is a real priority for me.
It’s a priority for me because Arizona is on the front lines of this megadrought. But it’s also an issue that impacts all of us.
There are steps we can take to help. We can build more water infrastructure. We can increase the water storage behind the dams we already have. We can help farmers with measures that conserve water. And we can take steps to fight climate change, which is the driving force behind this issue.
But I keep emailing about this challenge because Congress needs to know that this is a priority for you. If we speak up once and go silent, nothing will change. Only when people come together and make their voices heard time after time will we get the change we need on this issue.
I need your help on this, so here’s the part where I ask — again — for your support:
[**Can you please sign my petition urging Congress to take action on climate change — including water recycling, resilience, desalination and more? This issue is so important to Arizona, and to all of us.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/climate_change_petition_1017?source=em211017-1-15&t=1&akid=1533%2E6688874%2EUYkVCh)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/climate_change_petition_1017?source=em211017-1-15&t=2&akid=1533%2E6688874%2EUYkVCh)**
The good news is, there’s no country in the world better at solving big problems when we put our mind to it. We can do that now.
Let’s get it done, together.
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1533%2E6688874%2EUYkVCh).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
clean_body: Friends — In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make your voice heard on the issue of climate change and drought. First, let me explain why this request is so important: We’re in the middle of what some climate scientists call a “megadrought.” When you examine tree and soil data, it tells us that we’re in the middle of the worst drought in 1,200 years. The last time a drought lasted this long was in the 1500s, and we’ve already beat that record. And if you ask scientists, they’ll tell you these drought conditions are made worse by the effects of climate change, rising temperatures, and reduced snow melt. Last week, I chaired a bipartisan Senate hearing on the issue of drought in Western states. I’d called for this hearing because this issue is a real priority for me. It’s a priority for me because Arizona is on the front lines of this megadrought. But it’s also an issue that impacts all of us. There are steps we can take to help. We can build more water infrastructure. We can increase the water storage behind the dams we already have. We can help farmers with measures that conserve water. And we can take steps to fight climate change, which is the driving force behind this issue. But I keep emailing about this challenge because Congress needs to know that this is a priority for you. If we speak up once and go silent, nothing will change. Only when people come together and make their voices heard time after time will we get the change we need on this issue. I need your help on this, so here’s the part where I ask — again — for your support: The good news is, there’s no country in the world better at solving big problems when we put our mind to it. We can do that now. Let’s get it done, together. Mark Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
