body:
This will only take a minute or two of your time.
#
Got a minute, Peter?
As you may know, it’s been a busy few weeks for Team Jayapal as we continue fighting for child care, paid leave, universal pre-K, community college, climate action, affordable housing, Medicare expansion, and a roadmap to citizenship for immigrants through the Build Back Better Act. **But we’re not too busy to check in with you and make sure that our movement’s priorities align with yours in the pivotal final months of 2021.**
[**Can you take a minute or two to fill out our two-question Fourth Quarter Priorities Survey? We’re planning on sharing the results with Pramila as soon as we can.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/q4-priorities-survey/?source=em-20211017-725&t=1&akid=725%2E420207%2EUZVnyJ)

\--Team Jayapal

clean_body: I was under the impression you were one of President Trump's most reliable supporters. Hey Friend -- I'm following up on Mike Pompeo's critically important email. He told you President Trump called on us to win back control of Congress... Did you miss it? I was expecting to see your email included in our list of supporters. I was under the impression you were one of President Trump 's most reliable supporters, so I'm reaching out ONE LAST TIME. - Steve Scalise \----------- Forwarded Message ----------- From:Mike Pompeo Subject: I take President Trump's words seriously. I have a feeling you do too. Hey, Friend -- this is Mike Pompeo. I'm rushing to you for the first time like this because it can't wait. President Donald J. Trump, just made a big announcement: " I can't imagine a more important time to elect good Republicans to the House and Senate" \-- President Trump I couldn't agree more. Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are running our country into the ground -- and our window to stop them is closing by the second. That's why I can confidently say this to you: taking back Congress for the American People needs to be our single highest priority. Now it 's crunch time. It's critically important we act quickly. ****** President Trump is confident we can win because Conservative Patriots -- like you and me -- are strong and united. We will NEVER surrender to Pelosi and Schumer. I take this responsibility VERY seriously. I have a hunch that you do too. That's why your support is indispensable. For America, Mike Pompeo 70th U.S. Secretary of State ****** Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Folks, Three years ago, we did the impossible by electing the first Democratic Governor of Nevada in 20 years. **In that time, we’ve created a public health care option, invested in our public schools, stood with unions, and expanded reproductive freedom.** Right now, our legislative wins are on the line as we gear up for the upcoming election. We can’t leave anything up to chance -- **it’s crucial that we are able to out-organize and out-mobilize the National Republicans who are pouring resources into flipping Nevada red.** **[That’s why I’m humbly asking you to make a donation of any amount to my campaign so we can reach our mid-month fundraising goal. clean_body: | | | | | Folks, Three years ago, we did the impossible by electing the first Democratic Governor of Nevada in 20 years. In that time, we’ve created a public health care option, invested in our public schools, stood with unions, and expanded reproductive freedom. Right now, our legislative wins are on the line as we gear up for the upcoming election. We can’t leave anything up to chance -- it’s crucial that we are able to out-organize and out-mobilize the National Republicans who are pouring resources into flipping Nevada red. | | | | | | | | | | | | | I’ve got 5 Republican opponents who would love nothing more than to roll back all of our accomplishments one by one. They’re already flooding this race with money from the GOP war chest to fund their campaigns, while my campaign remains powered by grassroots donations from supporters like you. Your contributions make it possible for us to engage voters, launch digital ads, and combat misinformation from National Republicans who will stop at nothing trying to flip Nevada bright red. With more and more Republican outside spending in this race, I need your help to keep this fight fair. ****** | | | | | | | | | | | | Together, Steve | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor** P.O. Box 850 Las Vegas, NV 89125 mailto:info@stevesisolak.com | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Sisolak for Nevada, please .

subject: What early dollars allow us to do
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Peter,

Andy shocked the nation in 2019 when he unseated one of the country's most unpopular governors thanks to the support of folks across the Commonwealth.

Now, after two years of hard work and progress for Kentuckians, Andy's running for re-election. Keeping him in office couldn't be more crucial. It's how we will:
* Continue the fight against COVID-19;
* Keep improving our roads, bridges, and public schools;
* Expand job opportunities;
* Uphold our Kentucky values;
* And so much more.

On Tuesday, we're facing the first fundraising deadline of this campaign -- October's mid-month deadline -- and it's crucial that we raise money now that can sustain our grassroots campaign. [**Peter, will you help us reach our $4,000 fundraising goal before October's mid-month deadline? Chip in $5 or more now to support Governor Beshear >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37639455/311980346/-1771530716?refcode=em21_211015_mm1_fndd_gq_dnr___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211015_mm1_fndd_gq_dnr___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGJjMDg5ZC04MjJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QzkdezYepnQTDOXP9I9eSxTbF7XXSwoAEH3Z2sKKpeY=)

As we look at the road ahead, we know that forces across the country want to unseat Andy, and outside money will pour into the Commonwealth just as it did in the past. We have to be prepared.

Your support now will help us hire staff, connect directly with Kentuckians, and start this re-election campaign strong.

[**Will you make an early investment in Andy's re-election before our very first mid-month fundraising deadline? Chip in anything you can before Tuesday at midnight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37639456/311980347/-1771530716?refcode=em21_211015_mm1_fndd_gq_dnr___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211015_mm1_fndd_gq_dnr___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGJjMDg5ZC04MjJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QzkdezYepnQTDOXP9I9eSxTbF7XXSwoAEH3Z2sKKpeY=)

Thanks for the support,

Team Beshear

clean_body: Team -- the October mid-month fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight. But we checked our fundraising numbers this morning, and online donations have slowed down. What we raise now will mean more funds on hand to share Karen's message with Angelenos across the city. It's important we hit every single goal we set. Karen's building a grassroots campaign, which means the money we raise from these emails matters. We can't afford to miss any goal we set now until the primary. We know folks are fired up about Karen's campaign for mayor. She's seen an overwhelming wave of support from local and national leaders alike -- Senator Cory Booker, EMILY's List, Rep. Katie Porter, and Angelenos from every corner of the city are lining up to support her. But we need to stay on track with fundraising to keep this campaign running. Thank you, Karen Bass Finance Team Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A.. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. **Nina Turner grew up in a working-class family in Cleveland's Lee-Harvard community, experiencing firsthand the impact of income inequality and socioeconomic barriers. She made history as the first African American woman to represent Ward 1 on the Cleveland City Council, and again when she became the first African American woman to serve as State Senator in Ohio's 25th District. Nina then went on to serve as Chair of Party Engagement for the Ohio Democratic Party.** **Nina has a long track record of protecting reproductive justice, supporting labor rights, championing criminal justice reform, and spearheading the way toward a more equitable and inclusive Ohio. ** **She's building a movement to empower working families and mobilize Democrats on key progressive issues that impact everyday Americans who have been left behind. ** _**Take a stand with Nina and join our Democratic coalition today by pitching in now! >>**_ **______[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37640187/311986920/1761773496?refcode=211017_CLTV_indiawaltonevent_BIO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjgxNThlOC04NzJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=huQh-t1YEAtRQyb3jY0wq5kJmqGK_8lthNOtTH3sXTY=)**

body:

But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpoc1nq726bj9ub0c9ma4bmugov6or6a6cf7b8r0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clg64pr6cjh2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. name: ICYMI News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpqi58en21fric6kjhhljgie43qhf2qsn0jv342g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clg64p73c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhcg033iiiopqt362n2qbnvggenfq1bf9rku83io_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clg64p73c9h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk4hu8rcoonj7v0umgp3u89e881sdgriedn2hhn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clg64p73c9h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! body:
This poll is just one question. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37640479/311988964/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWJlNWIzNi04ZDJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rzX44AHWemi2ZgvjCC7c1D9ZXBgqUyOdQagPPdnJlW0=&emci=8d5d0c9b-c32d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=11be5b36-8d2f-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1049176)
**Quick question, Peter: Do you think North Carolina’s public school teachers deserve a raise?** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37640483/311988976/454032934?refcode=em_RC_PET_teachersraisepoll_101721_B1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWJlNWIzNi04ZDJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rzX44AHWemi2ZgvjCC7c1D9ZXBgqUyOdQagPPdnJlW0=) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37640487/311988980/454032934?refcode=em_RC_PET_teachersraisepoll_101721_B2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWJlNWIzNi04ZDJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rzX44AHWemi2ZgvjCC7c1D9ZXBgqUyOdQagPPdnJlW0=)
---|---
Our state’s teachers haven’t had a raise since _2018_ , and after all the struggles of the last year and a half — adapting to distance learning, figuring out how to conduct in-person classes safely — we believe they _more_ than deserve one now.
**Roy knows firsthand just what it takes to be a public school teacher — growing up, his mom was a public school teacher in Nash County, and she instilled in him a lifelong respect for the lengths teachers go to give our kids the best possible start.**
Now, he is fighting to make sure public school teachers get fair compensation that recognizes how hard they’ve had to work to make sure students continue receiving the quality education they deserve, even amidst a pandemic.
That’s why including a raise for teachers was a priority in his proposed budget — one that Republican leadership hasn’t yet gotten behind.
**So we want to hear from you: Do YOU believe that NC teachers deserve a raise this year?**
[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37640493/311988984/454032934?refcode=em_RC_PET_teachersraisepoll_101721_B3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWJlNWIzNi04ZDJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rzX44AHWemi2ZgvjCC7c1D9ZXBgqUyOdQagPPdnJlW0=) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37640495/311988989/454032934?refcode=em_RC_PET_teachersraisepoll_101721_B4&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWJlNWIzNi04ZDJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rzX44AHWemi2ZgvjCC7c1D9ZXBgqUyOdQagPPdnJlW0=)
---|---

Roy Cooper HQ

clean_body: This poll is just one question. | Quick question, Peter: Do you think North Carolina’s public school teachers deserve a raise? | = | = ---|--- Our state’s teachers haven’t had a raise since 2018 , and after all the struggles of the last year and a half — adapting to distance learning, figuring out how to conduct in-person classes safely — we believe they more than deserve one now. Roy knows firsthand just what it takes to be a public school teacher — growing up, his mom was a public school teacher in Nash County, and she instilled in him a lifelong respect for the lengths teachers go to give our kids the best possible start. Now, he is fighting to make sure public school teachers get fair compensation that recognizes how hard they’ve had to work to make sure students continue receiving the quality education they deserve, even amidst a pandemic. That’s why including a raise for teachers was a priority in his proposed budget — one that Republican leadership hasn’t yet gotten behind. So we want to hear from you: Do YOU believe that NC teachers deserve a raise this year? = | = ---|--- Thanks for taking our poll, Roy Cooper HQ = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. I'm sorry for popping into your inbox like this – but I'm leaning on my strongest supporters because **Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate.** [****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIYNvFf6SEGt0mJo6yB45Qd3i1DutVS1HlvakYXEYmEag1Q9tuOK_GBy0qodw5Lz4auNKBxmGgj_IVFdukmEGmXn1EZnXUjQTMSRW6arfdEHWqfoEjrvWotUnwAa6nUhaq5ux46qW0ED4P7b1wWOOe5r1ptLNYeHwDH8SYxJ6Nf3Y9aj1s4-FIDnbSEKFyN5NUmMPHP90nGhCbvpd7X0yFu4Wx1sd3olUcF1mhfCJNblepqhfPeS92rv6znrbBQrHSlhLPMMCHLQLSCNB-MszB1KyNMPsgMqoCs0PfsG0H9uk/3g8/TE84WQi4TFOVG-26gYfaqQ/h1/1ej_JlEiUsowFHKQSu5lfJGhzAPIQddX_MxdE8J6lpo) I'm fighting to defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate – but I just found out that the Republican National Committee is investing at least $10 MILLION in on-the-ground organizers to keep Florida RED for decades. I can’t bear the thought.

I'll give it to you straight, Derek: GOP leaders are saying that registering 60,000 more Republican voters could hand Florida to the GOP _permanently_. I'm not giving up on Florida – but with Republicans pouring money into this race, I need to make critical investments right now. And I cannot afford to make those investments if I miss my critical $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal tonight.

clean_body: Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate. | | | Hi, Derek. I'm sorry for popping into your inbox like this – but I'm leaning on my strongest supporters because Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate. I'm fighting to defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate – but I just found out that the Republican National Committee is investing at least $10 MILLION in on-the-ground organizers to keep Florida RED for decades. I can’t bear the thought. I'll give it to you straight, Derek: GOP leaders are saying that registering 60,000 more Republican voters could hand Florida to the GOP permanently. I'm not giving up on Florida – but with Republicans pouring money into this race, I need to make critical investments right now. And I cannot afford to make those investments if I miss my critical $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal tonight. I can't thank you enough for your support. Congresswoman Val Demings | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbhdfsjhqmv2qau2amn56082jkhb9b3dp2cfc0o0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clg62ob6cph2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj8lihbpcu7dsri6l2lp1uiu8o9d7r8s2c889o00_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clg62ob6cph2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoqba21258l4ka93merv4nfp63535tdphk3sade0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clg62ob6cph2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp1i683vlplkud9vk7hlkbbqtcjlvoptg1fgh77g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clg62ob6cph2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztpmd2dqct5pnegsedpek5h2di6as3mlmnntkki0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clg62ob6cph2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zribu53hm0mnlip0n7q28e5d972bh8f5173gfao8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clg62ob6cph2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpas6racts7l1f915o8d47mdmc9sfn31id17atj8_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcac7ejdjq6tesh2hrh0u2oh1fi75fuhc769crh8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clg62ob6cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: Biden's Next Vaccine Mandate Could be the Worst Yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate
body:
[URGENT UPDATE]

| | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DfjFr_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7iKk44ynb4iePI-2BdgDXmfzDvRU9V-2FjBT7bskQCgAwJFVkNgiR0E4dMV53OIEQH687XYW2acUhK47f2yqURqJRCofE61wFvvY0nkulCAUGwIsVDhD8CJNdr43dUluXi5wreZCDEGxtB-2F-2BvuZl-2FdzURAZdUFlH9sUL54V-2FXs6dVBCTpVsSrmvepfaPgTZc5Ne16WE2xzGdVfZwdg4ls-2FILKiknJZ6VHd-2BH-2FY0XCH-2FoLEaRE-2BBW3r6S-2FnhDDQ-2B404NYvH-2FiOdzX8I7M2-2F4OSnrrssNSPSu-2BqAqqvZJYZn2QHsNlqU1yd7WpV2YzYlODUHi5wMVq0DgmAoj7ZO3MkXg6AEg-3D-3D)
---
| Dear Patriot, I'm worried about what Joe Biden's next move is. Already, he has mandated vaccines for all companies with 100 or more employees. This means that anyone who doesn't comply will be fired from their jobs. But just how much farther is he willing to go? Joe Biden is on record saying that "97% or 98%" of Americans need to be vaccinated before the country can get back to normal -- a number that is wildly unrealistic. I can only imagine what Biden has up his sleeve to force Americans to get their shots. **Will people be forced to show their vaccination cards to travel?** **... or to hold a job of any kind?** **... or to shop for groceries?** **How far will Joe Biden go to punish those who have chosen not to get vaccinated?** The answer is this: he will go as far as you and I allow him to. And as he tries to punish ordinary Americans, I will stand in his way no matter what the political cost. But here's the problem: my seat in the U.S. Senate is going to be hotly contested very soon. And I rely on conservative patriots like you to keep me in office while I spend every day holding the line against Biden's tyranny. [Will you contribute $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away so that I can stay in this fight?](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DehHq_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7iKk44ynb4iePI-2BdgDXmfzDvRU9V-2FjBT7bskQCgAwJFVkNgiR0E4dMV53OIEQH687XYW2acUhK47f2yqURqJRCofE61wFvvY0nkulCAUGwIsVDhD8CJNdr43dUluXi5wreZCDEGxtB-2F-2BvuZl-2FdzURAV1yjwrFJNpNkBTcqZ3o0bjLEb6AbBb8e2wblcKdu16SDRUevePtYWoT48LPwa1He-2FaSk5Of8q8SHuzZKDtwrdnxENZIxYmjjG5gAPGs8AbsQGnpDSNB24fFp11vrouHgrwzlX3CrEeHOoBN2uPFH1SF0j2v6qHWHlosle7UGwCSi-2BATzaOGADTf-2FVGBeOHRGA-3D-3D) You and I are proud Americans who have been blessed with the gift of liberty from our forefathers. It is our duty to defend that gift against those who would take it away from us. Getting a vaccine is a personal decision that every American has the free will to choose for themselves. Joe Biden has no right to force you or I to comply with his mandates. **I am making this pledge to you, I will continue to be his greatest obstacle as he destroys the Constitution and forces Americans to get vaccinated.** But I can't do that if I lose my Senate seat. As I spend hours, days, and weeks fighting back against the corrupt establishment and their unconstitutional mandates, the Left is on the ground campaigning against me. And that's why I need you so urgently. clean_body: [URGENT UPDATE] | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, I'm worried about what Joe Biden's next move is. Already, he has mandated vaccines for all companies with 100 or more employees. This means that anyone who doesn't comply will be fired from their jobs. But just how much farther is he willing to go? Joe Biden is on record saying that "97% or 98%" of Americans need to be vaccinated before the country can get back to normal -- a number that is wildly unrealistic. I can only imagine what Biden has up his sleeve to force Americans to get their shots. Will people be forced to show their vaccination cards to travel? ... or to hold a job of any kind? ... or to shop for groceries? How far will Joe Biden go to punish those who have chosen not to get vaccinated? The answer is this: he will go as far as you and I allow him to. And as he tries to punish ordinary Americans, I will stand in his way no matter what the political cost. But here's the problem: my seat in the U.S. Senate is going to be hotly contested very soon. And I rely on conservative patriots like you to keep me in office while I spend every day holding the line against Biden's tyranny. You and I are proud Americans who have been blessed with the gift of liberty from our forefathers. It is our duty to defend that gift against those who would take it away from us. name: Nicole Neily, Parents Defending Education
subject: DOJ: “Concerned parents = domestic terrorists?”
body:
Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8821%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=HHGBAfZVt7CbM2zxqvWyFg&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15461%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w4ycWN3MJKTcJ1Lq2PFYmA&sysid=1) Fellow American, Maybe you heard the news - recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said **they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children! ** On October 4, 2021, the DOJ announced a new initiative to address “harassment, intimidation and threats of violence” against school board members and employees - including but not limited to **the creation of a federal task force as well as dedicated lines of communication for threat reporting, assessment, and response by law enforcement under the auspices of the FBI.** [**Tell the DOJ this is unacceptable**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15462%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zg9H3RSN4ynC%2b9vn6KxOEQ&sysid=1) My name is Nicole Neily, and I’m the President of Parents Defending Education. We’re a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas, and fighting against indoctrination in the classroom -- and _for_ the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. We are also standing with parents like you who are troubled by what’s happening in our schools today. You might be wondering how something so outrageous -- **the FBI being mobilized against parents for simply speaking up for their own children** \-- could happen in “the land of the free.” It all started recently, when the National School Board Association (NSBA) sent a letter to President Biden asking for help **silencing parents like you** who are demanding change at school board meetings. In their letter, NSBA cites a tiny number of minor incidents to insinuate that** parents who are criticizing and protesting the decisions of school boards are or may be engaging in “domestic terrorism and hate crimes."** While PDE naturally does not support _anyone_ who uses violence or threats against school board members, officials, or teachers, the NSBA choosing to invoke the PATRIOT Act (which was passed after 9/11 to uncover potential terrorist plots) takes it WAY too far. The association of legitimate protest with terrorism and violence reveals both NSBA’s contempt for parents and their unwillingness to understand and hear the sincere cries of parents on behalf of their children. In short, **_NSBA’s letter to President Biden was a thinly veiled threat_** , intended to intimidate into silence and submission the very constituents -- parents and taxpayers like you, -- that its members ostensibly represent. And the Department of Justice is wholly complicit in this charade. [**Tell the DOJ you OPPOSE FBI persecution of parents**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15463%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7bQAehqE%2btBjtWVN4RMkeQ&sysid=1) I’m in awe that NSBA would choose to threaten parents for having the courage to hold them accountable -- as I’m sure you are. And it’s unthinkable that concerned parents should be equated with domestic terrorists. **We will not be bullied.** We refuse to have our free speech chilled by threats. America’s parents have a constitutional right to petition our elected officials -- and Parents Defending Education will continue to do so, with the support of parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens like you! The good news is that this proves the NSBA, the teachers’ unions, and radical school boards around the country are running scared. They’ve been bullying us for decades -- and now that parents are standing up to them, they’re terrified. **The mere fact that they’ve summoned the Biden administration to back up their crazy power trip clearly shows they feel the power slipping from their hands.** In cities and towns across America, we’re seeing a backlash against the school administrators and bureaucrats who disdain the parents whose children they are entrusted with educating. This behavior is arrogant and out of touch and these fiefdoms must be exposed and held accountable. And that’s exactly what Parents Defending Education is doing -- keeping the pressure on the NSBA, teachers’ unions, and school boards. But we need the support of parents, teachers, and concerned Americans like you to effectively fight back against these bullies and defend the rights of American parents and school children. [**Tell the DOJ you won’t be bullied**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15464%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JUxg693ZmbhBGq0B7Qu4fw&sysid=1) So thank you for standing with us -- and standing _up_ for America’s parents! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207

clean_body: Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents Fellow American, Maybe you heard the news - recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children! On October 4, 2021, the DOJ announced a new initiative to address “harassment, intimidation and threats of violence” against school board members and employees - including but not limited to the creation of a federal task force as well as dedicated lines of communication for threat reporting, assessment, and response by law enforcement under the auspices of the FBI. My name is Nicole Neily, and I’m the President of Parents Defending Education. We’re a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas, and fighting against indoctrination in the classroom -- and for the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. We are also standing with parents like you who are troubled by what’s happening in our schools today. You might be wondering how something so outrageous -- the FBI being mobilized against parents for simply speaking up for their own children \-- could happen in “the land of the free.” It all started recently, when the National School Board Association (NSBA) sent a letter to President Biden asking for help silencing parents like you who are demanding change at school board meetings. In their letter, NSBA cites a tiny number of minor incidents to insinuate that parents who are criticizing and protesting the decisions of school boards are or may be engaging in “domestic terrorism and hate crimes." While PDE naturally does not support anyone who uses violence or threats against school board members, officials, or teachers, the NSBA choosing to invoke the PATRIOT Act (which was passed after 9/11 to uncover potential terrorist plots) takes it WAY too far. The association of legitimate protest with terrorism and violence reveals both NSBA’s contempt for parents and their unwillingness to understand and hear the sincere cries of parents on behalf of their children. In short, NSBA’s letter to President Biden was a thinly veiled threat , intended to intimidate into silence and submission the very constituents -- parents and taxpayers like you, -- that its members ostensibly represent. And the Department of Justice is wholly complicit in this charade. I’m in awe that NSBA would choose to threaten parents for having the courage to hold them accountable -- as I’m sure you are. And it’s unthinkable that concerned parents should be equated with domestic terrorists. We will not be bullied. We refuse to have our free speech chilled by threats. America’s parents have a constitutional right to petition our elected officials -- and Parents Defending Education will continue to do so, with the support of parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens like you! The good news is that this proves the NSBA, the teachers’ unions, and radical school boards around the country are running scared. They’ve been bullying us for decades -- and now that parents are standing up to them, they’re terrified. The mere fact that they’ve summoned the Biden administration to back up their crazy power trip clearly shows they feel the power slipping from their hands. In cities and towns across America, we’re seeing a backlash against the school administrators and bureaucrats who disdain the parents whose children they are entrusted with educating. This behavior is arrogant and out of touch and these fiefdoms must be exposed and held accountable. And that’s exactly what Parents Defending Education is doing -- keeping the pressure on the NSBA, teachers’ unions, and school boards. But we need the support of parents, teachers, and concerned Americans like you to effectively fight back against these bullies and defend the rights of American parents and school children. So thank you for standing with us -- and standing up for America’s parents! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119 Arlington VA 22207 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6m5frlcj8n07t1sibtr7dorfmelo4fd6rci2fcg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clg61o36cph2bs)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhp4joep83vk2092ch9o92nosbd1ca2cu0cm0oe8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clg61o36cph2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zi7patfn8nhh851367t6ik3btct0p19vu3pplovo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clg61o36cph2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Reminder: Aadland for U.S. Senate News
body:
Erik on the consequence of Democratic rule
---
| | | | | | Volume 12 | October 12, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| Our nation is growing increasingly unsafe, not only on the world stage due to the insipid weakness of the Biden administration and the failure in Afghanistan, but in our very neighborhoods. Crime is on the rise--statistics released this week by the Federal Bureau of Investigation show a 30% rise in the homicide rate in 2020.
And while Democrats blame the pandemic for every woe, what they won't tell you is that nine out of the top 10 cities for crime are Democrat led. Radical Left policies that seek to defund law enforcement are driving this wave of crime. In Austin, Texas, where they cut funding to the police, the city has asked its citizens to not call 9-1-1. As a result, crime has exploded, and the homicide rate is at an all-time high. In Minneapolis, famous for defunding the police, homicides rose 87% in the last year. The local government there in response voted to re-fund law enforcement. Unfortunately, you can't re-fund lives that were lost due to these insanely malicious and neglectful policies.
In addition, criminal elements are exploiting our porous Southern border. Illicit drug-use and distribution is on the rise. We must re-secure our Southern border immediately. Furthermore, the Department of Justice tis suffering from a crisis of leadership; we must hold it accountable in how it is failing to keep America safe by letting dangerous criminals roam free.
I stand with our law enforcement agencies. I want to end the early release of prisoners and restore teeth to the justice system. Left wing ideology is backfiring and putting our neighborhoods in peril. In a free society, law and order must be held in careful balance. We must observe the rule of law by bringing violent criminals to justice.
Meanwhile, those who faithfully fulfilled their duties during the most challenging of times, seeing us through the worst of the pandemic without a COVID-19 vaccination, should not now be mandated to receive one. To force a vaccination after the true threat has past is simply wrong.
We must take a stand against vaccine mandates. Period. If government intrusion does not stop at the boundary of our skin, where does it stop? Just this week, a member of my campaign staff told me his spouse's job is in jeopardy because she is not comfortable taking the jab. This comes after years of honest service to the employer. This is unconscionable, and I commend her for her courage. Help me stand against this blatant and tyrannical government overreach. .
Erik
---
| | |
---
| | | [Visit Aadland for U.S. Senate website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WbtzcsJFCPsoKL81VSQAzzGYjb5aDeWlhoVGncxzgqHCRsIcTNk7D3dt2ZwOv9tMO-qrdR05LeBx2YHt9TxaGkpmXwZY0YWnJSndUTaW3P6rsngWKG8Wonr4jYc7ACry97yQflJALXsZCMHKLp7-zHHvckJdZqZI&c=Nde9brOMdW4-6H4bRzGN8g-GutjlQQR85mnIBAIBc9Xm2A9W8bPXVw==&ch=NS5B78EetoT36lZdDChaofnMy9vSkNmdt8ImaLM4ljEXqLr3gRgT0g==)

| | |
---
| Upcoming Events
---
| |
---|---
|
* Wednesday, Oct. 13: Park County Republican Central Committee Meeting in the Fairplay Barn at the Fairplay County Fairgrounds. Meeting starts at 7:00 PM (Erik will speak and answer questions)

* Saturday Oct. 16: Erik will be in-studio with Randy Corporon on 710 AM KNUS. Tune in to the 9 o'clock hour.

* Saturday Oct 17: Erik will speak to the Colorado Federation of Republican Women's 83rd Annual Board of Directors Meeting & Fall Convention. Embassy Suites by Hilton 10250 E. Costilla Ave Centennial CO. 9:00am-11:00am

| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
This past week I was on the Peter Boyles show, traveled south and met with the Chaffee County Patriots, spoke with the Jefferson County Men's Republican group, and appeared on the Atypical Intellects Podcast.

Tuesday, I head to the San Luis Valley to meet with Alamosa County Republicans. This Wednesday night, I'll share my vision for taking back our country with the Park County Republicans and on Saturday, I'll be on Randy Corporon's show at 9:25 a.m. on KNUS.

Once again, thank you for supporting this campaign which is dedicated to protecting the freedoms and rights of all Coloradans and Americans. Together we can stand against the tyranny of the radical Left. I can't do it alone, so anything you can do to contribute to the cause will help us drive back the extensive overreach of government, allowing each of us to make the best choices for our own lives as we see fit.

I hope to see you somewhere on the campaign trail.
| |
---
| | |
---
| Fundraising?
---
| Yes. Fundraising is far from the most enjoyable activity in which a campaign engages. But the fact is, money is crucial to reaching people with the news of Erik Aadland. Since this is a state-wide campaign, our task is to reach every single voter in Colorado. Costs to reach these folks range from printed materials to travel to advertising and much more. Aadland for U.S. Senate is a true grass-roots campaign. We don't have the advantage of a ten-figure personal fortune to get going like other campaigns which Colorado has had to endure. We count on every-day folks like you to to help with any amount they can. Please consider helping Erik secure the Republican nomination by making a donation today.
Help us save the country! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for U.S. Senate Staff

body:
| | |
---
It's the weekend, so we'll make this quick friend. Our mid-month deadline came and went on Friday, and _we just missed our goal_. Yesterday, we set an emergency goal to make up for lost ground and respond to Republican attacks but, we're still behind. | | Derek, In America, the fact is, buying a home is crucial to building wealth and growing the middle class. Unfortunately, due to discrimination and inequities in our economy, that dream has been kept out of reach for too many hard-working Americans, particularly people of color. That’s why Senator Warner helped introduce the Low-Income First Time Homebuyers (LIFT) Act, a new program that will help put home ownership within reach for first-generation buyers. Senator Warner is working hard to close the racial wealth gap through home ownership. **_[Will you sign on now to join him in the fight for wealth equity?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37641667/311995236/-59524357?ms=mw_em_211017_1&refcode=mw_em_211017_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODIwOTU0Yi05ZDJmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nDPTdAC3RPqmvGUpmCXmWS1-CdrQKCtm4y9YRI8inFk=&emci=7f0e4d16-302d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=f820954b-9d2f-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=4568237)_** The LIFT Act will help allow qualified home buyers to build equity and wealth at twice the rate of a conventional 30-year mortgage. Housing experts agree this innovative proposal will help thousands of Virginians afford their first home. Mark Warner is committed to ensuring everyone has the opportunity to earn a good life in Virginia. * Negotiated living wages in keeping with their skills and training.

body:

Hey there folks,

I was hoping I wouldn’t have to write this email, but we fell short of our
mid-month $25,000 fundraising goal. We got so close, but close just isn’t
good enough if we’re going to flip this Ohio Senate seat blue -- we need
to hit every goal.

Truth is that every dollar we fall short is a dollar Tim’s far-right
opponents will use against us.

We need your help Folks -- we can’t win this without you.

If everyone that reads this email donates even a few bucks, we’ll have no
problem catching up on our monthly fundraising.

We HAVE to win Ohio to expand the Democratic Senate majority. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5321?amount=25&t=1007&akid=1161%2E3611125%2EA2MhxJ ]Can you

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8835%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=S9HtV5DDCE6m2BQVR7akxA&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15476%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y8PF1J1es856U5c6g496PA&sysid=1) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15477%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MkKyeaXeD88nEyK%2bO1Ta7A&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15476%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y8PF1J1es856U5c6g496PA&sysid=1) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15478%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=64hl%2fzFIngx%2f4wcgutkYwA&sysid=1) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students --the least affected by the disease -- must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15479%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=StZu%2fB6dk3PyylFSIVXYSA&sysid=1) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15470%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t7U0FPiDHnmOoqejuk1oSg&sysid=1) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8835%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=S9HtV5DDCE6m2BQVR7akxA&sysid=1)_

And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a “NO FORCED VAX” campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. This move by the universities is not about vaccines AT ALL. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students --the least affected by the disease -- must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his ONLINE college classes until he takes the vaccine! If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next! We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 _

name: Parents Defending Education
subject: Teachers' unions are out of control
body:
Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c491%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=kewxYvrwazsTmYg9qrt43g&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66183%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CKCS4VpsTvMDx2PbTrIuLg&sysid=1) Fellow American, Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the target of a lawsuit from the National Education Association (NEA) -- the largest teachers’ union in the country -- just for asking questions. After enrolling her daughter in kindergarten, this mom asked the principal for more information about the curriculum. **She wanted to know what would be taught about Critical Race Theory (CRT) and gender identity.** The response? This Rhode Island mom says she was told to file public records (FOIA) requests to get the information she wanted. She filed FOIA requests ... **_and now a lawsuit from the NEA has followed._** **Teachers’ unions shouldn’t bully, intimidate, or silence concerned parents, community members, or groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) that want to improve their kids’ education. ** **[If you agree, please click here to sign the declaration right now -- and join over 50,000 concerned parents and taxpayers who are standing up for a healthy, non-politicized education for our kids.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66184%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RVi%2b0SSP36bAJuLnYTQT9w&sysid=1)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66195%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7Eq0sRn5LFolmyeWZItrWg&sysid=1) Parents Defending Education is a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas. Through network and coalition building, investigative reporting, litigation, and engagement on local, state, and national policies, we are fighting for the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. **Right now, teachers’ unions are a major roadblock to making that vision a reality, and it’s time for parents to start wielding the enormous power we possess to reclaim our schools.** [**You can take the first step right now by signing this national declaration.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66196%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8nUvIfJ3WGnGWucx2750cA&sysid=1) You and I both know there are many thousands of outstanding teachers across the country who work hard every day to educate students and put them on a path to lifelong success. They’re the teachers who inspire your kids’ love of reading ... or spark an interest in science that leads them to a rewarding career ... or provide the mentorship and support that changes their lives. But too often this year, you and I have seen teachers’ unions put politics ahead of students and classroom learning -- and lash out against parents and groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) for our involvement in our kids’ educations. At PDE, we’ve experienced this firsthand. This summer, the NEA passed a resolution at its annual conference to allocate more than $50,000 to “research” groups like Parents Defending Education. And although they used the word “research,” they really mean “investigate and smear.” If they thought this “cancel culture” tactic would intimidate us -- they were wrong. We’re more committed than ever to defending a healthy, non-political education for all students. **[If you stand with PDE, as I believe you do, please add your name to this declaration to stand with students, parents, and classroom teachers over the political interests of teachers’ unions.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66197%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bqo6OuJUdC8mWOu6O%2bEVTw&sysid=1)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66195%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7Eq0sRn5LFolmyeWZItrWg&sysid=1) Thank you for your support. Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66198%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TTODmowOjjj9owhZgu7oUQ&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66199%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZQ7BMc1N5bBUI8zmiK6KWw&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66190%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G4%2bEOXObkUnIEXvhLH%2fSLw&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66191%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7cNiu2q%2fn5MEpqLtDZofXw&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66192%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RJV634ffA571m1RgPgx%2bHQ&sysid=1)
---|---|---|---|---

name: Team Fetterman
subject: It’s time to head to your county registration office (or just open this email)!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Tomorrow is the deadline to vote for the November 2021 Pennsylvania elections. Here’s what we think you should look out for.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211017-3029-header&t=1&akid=3029%2E434096%2E7O7a4C)
October 18, 2021.
That’s tomorrow, Peter — **and it's the last chance to register for the 2021 Pennsylvania elections on Tuesday, November 2.**
Our team talks to you a looooot about the big elections happening in 2022, but I wanted to make sure you’re in the loop about the important PA municipal and judicial elections happening in *just* a few weeks.
**[We’re asking you today, Peter — urgently — to get ready for the November 2021 election by checking your registration status and registering to vote. Tomorrow is your last chance. Make sure that your family and neighbors are registered as well!](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32737?t=2&akid=3029%2E434096%2E7O7a4C)**
The stakes couldn’t be higher, Peter. We really need to make sure everyone we know is checking their registration status. As Political Director — part of my job is making sure that voters are prepared for every election here in PA. On November’s ballot we’re:
⚖️ Electing judges to the Pennsylvania courts, who act as our defense against far-right attacks on our state democracy. The Pennsylvania Democratic Party has put together a [guide on our endorsed judges here.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33040?t=3&akid=3029%2E434096%2E7O7a4C)
🗳️ County and municipal offices will be on your November ballot, from townships and boroughs to your school districts. Make sure you look up who will be on your ballot ahead of receiving your ballot by mail or voting in person!
We’re working to elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate, but a healthy democracy starts with our local offices. **After all, John proudly served as Mayor of Braddock for 15 years.**
**[To ensure that our local offices are serving working families, just like John will in the U.S. Senate, we first have to make sure that every voter in PA is prepared for the 2021 November election. Join us in checking your voter registration, and the registration status of your loved ones.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32737?t=4&akid=3029%2E434096%2E7O7a4C)**
**[Register to Vote in PA »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32737?t=5&akid=3029%2E434096%2E7O7a4C)**
With your help, we’ll put the voices of working people in every office across our state.
Thank you for your diligence, and happy voting!
Celeste
Celeste Trusty
Political Director
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211017-3029-footer&t=6&refcode2=3029_434096_7O7a4C&akid=3029%2E434096%2E7O7a4C)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=7&akid=3029%2E434096%2E7O7a4C)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=3029%2E434096%2E7O7a4C)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: American Update
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8824%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=fG287CpX8IQabxqF0AISfw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15499%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VUGIdEnoR3efqk9FEY1gwQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15499%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VUGIdEnoR3efqk9FEY1gwQ&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15490%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f20QFMNFN0Qj8cC%2fqY4TbQ&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

This time last year, we were in a battle for the soul of our nation, and because of grassroots supporters like you, we won.

Fellow Conservative,

The Green New Deal is not a serious piece of policy and will only hurt the pockets of Americans at the end of the day.

The Democrats are attempting to fund their radical policies by secretly slipping funding into bills that have nothing to do with the climate. This comes at the expense of small businesses, but the Radical Left could care less. We need to focus on the real issues and not wildly inflated ones due to partisan ideals. clean_body: Green New Deal will destroy the pockets of all Americans! | TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Fellow Conservative, I have found myself questioning the priorities of the Biden Administration and their Radical Left allies. Recently, the “brilliant” Jen Psaki stood in front of the entire world to claim that the Climate Crisis is one of the biggest National Security threats our nation is facing....Seriously? | Instead of working to fix actual National Security threats, like a wide‐open Southern Border that allows criminals of all types to come into our country freely, the Democrat party is focused on their partisan agenda. The Green New Deal is not a serious piece of policy and will only hurt the pockets of Americans at the end of the day. The Democrats are attempting to fund their radical policies by secretly slipping funding into bills that have nothing to do with the climate. This comes at the expense of small businesses, but the Radical Left could care less. We need to focus on the real issues and not wildly inflated ones due to partisan ideals. The Green New Deal will benefit countries like China more than America. Are you surprised with how often the Democrat Party bends over backward to please the Chinese Communists? Sincerely, Ted Budd TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: John Fetterman
subject: URGENT: Striking John Deere workers need our help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m proud to stand in *full* solidarity with UAW and the 10,000 John Deere workers striking nationwide for a fair contract + better pay. ✊
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211017-3053-header&t=1&akid=3053%2E434096%2EkqlF3r)
Hi, it’s John.
Last week, I was proud to support BCTGM Local 374-G’s fund for striking Kellogg’s workers here in PA.
Now, I am proud to stand in *full* solidarity with UAW and the 10,000 John Deere workers striking nationwide for a fair contract + better pay. ✊
**If you're able to, Peter, I am respectfully asking you to join me in supporting UAW members walking the picket line right now:**
[**_Will you please chip in $5 or more to UAW’s strike fund today? Every dollar in the strike fund goes directly to food + supplies for striking John Deere workers across the country._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33239?t=2&akid=3053%2E434096%2EkqlF3r)__
[**__**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33239?t=3&akid=3053%2E434096%2EkqlF3r)
**[Support the Strike Fund »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33239?t=4&akid=3053%2E434096%2EkqlF3r)**
Look, John Deere is a multi-billion dollar corporation. The company has already posted historic profits this year of almost $5 billion dollars. 🤯
But those who create the wealth must share in it, you know? The John Deere workers who helped make that possible should be able to live in dignity. They deserve a fair contract + higher wages RIGHT NOW.
**That’s exactly why 10,000 UAW members, mostly in Iowa and Illinois, are walking the picket line as you read this email — and they could really use our help.**
[**_Can you please chip in to UAW’s strike fund as an act of solidarity? Even $5 will help UAW reach its goal of raising $25,000 into the strike fund to support workers._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33239?t=5&akid=3053%2E434096%2EkqlF3r)
**[Support the Strike Fund »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33239?t=6&akid=3053%2E434096%2EkqlF3r)**
The union way of life is sacred, and we should *always* protect it. Thanks for standing with me. 🙏
In solidarity,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211017-3053-footer&t=7&refcode2=3053_434096_kqlF3r&akid=3053%2E434096%2EkqlF3r)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=8&akid=3053%2E434096%2EkqlF3r)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=3053%2E434096%2EkqlF3r)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Alicia Pardo
subject: I'm showing you this screenshot for a reason, team
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

This is important: I just checked our finance tracking Google sheet, and I wanted to give you a live look:

Team, I’m giving you a live look because I need you to know where we stand. Can you click here to chip in now and help us get back on track? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=1017alicia]

Last month, Ron DeSantis raked in millions of dollars traveling the country on fundraising trips. And we know this month won’t be any different. DeSantis has at least one out-of-state fundraising trip planned, this time for a $25,000 per plate dinner in San Francisco.

I can’t overstate the stakes of this moment. For months, DeSantis has been cozying up to GOP megadonors and leaving Floridians to fend for ourselves. But, if we meet this goal, we'll have the momentum we need to fight back.

Team, that’s why I’m coming to you directly for your support. Please click here to chip in now if you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=1017alicia]

Thanks for being in this fight with us--we couldn’t do it without you!

Alicia Pardo
Finance Consultant

Patriots,

Taiwan is one of our strongest strategic allies in the world. They stand for Freedom and Democracy, while China stands for Communism and aggression.

China sees how weak the United States is under Joe Biden, and because of our disastrous exit from Afghanistan, China thinks they can get away with **ANYTHING** under this President.

**They are testing us.** It should be of concern to all Americans that China is in Taiwanese airspace. Right now, Taiwan needs the unequivocal support of its closest allies, not capitulation to the Chinese Communist regime. Biden should STAND STRONG with our allies, not COWER.

We **MUST** Take Back the House to hold Biden in check before his foreign policy blunders lead to more conflict.

**[We cannot hold Biden in check without your help. clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, we launched a one-day match opportunity to help us reach tonight’s $1,000,000 Defend Democracy fundraising goal. Since we haven’t reached our goal yet, I wanted to remind you why reaching this goal is so important. I’m running against a right-wing culture warrior who wants to defund Planned Parenthood, go “on offense” to ban abortion, and roll back progress in Virginia. He’s been endorsed by Donald Trump six times, and he even endorsed another 4 years of Trump as president. He has indulged Trump’s ridiculous conspiracy theories about the 2020 election, and then pretended he played no part in creating a supporter base that celebrated the January 6 insurrection. He’s dangerous, and he’s all wrong for Virginia, Derek. That’s why I’m so stunned that we haven’t reached our goal yet ... what’s it going to take? = Thank you for taking this seriously, Terry | = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: What's critical about right now:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Nearly 90% of Congressional races are won by the candidate who spends more
money. We’ve won races with less money, like when Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
beat a high-ranking corporate Democrat in 2018. But it’s really hard to
do, and that’s one of the reasons AOC’s victory shocked the political
establishment so much.

AOC’s opponent in 2018 spent at least 5 times more than she did on the
primary election. AOC won because she was what NY-14 needed, had a strong
campaign, and a strong message. We helped her build that campaign.

As we build power and see the impact of the 10 Justice Democrats in
Congress, we’ve been able to close the spending gap. Then, more challenges
came our way. The political establishment started spending millions
through Super PACs to smear our candidates. Centrist and right-wing
groups, big corporations and Wall Street all started flooding money into
our races to keep corporate Democrats in office.

We continue to shock the political establishment because of our grassroots
support. We do our best to match the unlimited resources of the political
establishment with donations of $3, $16.95 (our average donation this
year), $27 or more from folks like you. We rely on your support 100%, we
don’t take a cent from corporate PACs.

And we use your donations strategically,
Peter. We build campaigns to win,
help our candidates hire staff, set up field organizing operations,
support media strategies, and so much more.

We’re supporting four primary challengers for 2022 — Jessica Cisneros,
Odessa Kelly, Kina Collins, and Rana Abdelhamid — with more to come. That
takes a lot of money, especially when our opponents are bankrolled by Wall
Street and the Democratic establishment. These primaries are around the
corner (Jessica’s is in March!) and we need your help right now to expand
progressive power in Congress.

So, Peter, can
you make your
first $3 contribution to elect more Justice
Democrats and transform the Democratic Party? We set a critical goal to
raise $15,000 by Saturday at 11:59 p.m. so we can fund these primaries!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/75479?refcode=em20211017-20021&t=1002&akid=20021%2E1203867%2E_uGwgI ]→ Yes, I can give $3 to Justice Democrats to help grow
the Squad!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/75479?refcode=em20211017-20021&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=20021%2E1203867%2E_uGwgI ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=20021%2E1203867%2E_uGwgI ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=20021%2E1203867%2E_uGwgI ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211017-20021-footer&t=1006&refcode2=20021_1203867__uGwgI&akid=20021%2E1203867%2E_uGwgI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=20021%2E1203867%2E_uGwgI

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
