name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: what do you think?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
I hate to email you on your Sunday, but this couldn't wait. | |
My team just reviewed the preliminary results of my official October Priorities Survey -- **_and they didn 't see your response!_**

**I 'm urgently calling for responses from 15,000 more supporters _(including you!)_ before my midnight deadline to help craft a winning campaign strategy to defend our House Majority.**

**So I 'm asking personally: Will you submit your feedback straight away and then chip in $3 at the link below to help me protect my House Democrats?**

[**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccoct2021**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_qfg7YxxQ_)

| **OFFICIAL OCTOBER PRIORITIES SURVEY**

**FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com
RESPONSE STATUS: MISSING
RESPONSE REQUESTED BY: ****10/17, 11:59pm**

My team asked for input from 25,000 grassroots Democrats.

But with just five hours to go until my deadline, I'm still coming up short of my campaign strategy feedback goal!

So now, I'm counting on YOU to join them and let me know what's on your mind straight away.

**Please, will you take my October Priorities Survey before midnight?**
---
[YES >>](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_8wc6-)
---|---|---

I hate to email you on your Sunday, but this couldn't wait.

**My Official October Priorities Survey deadline expires in just five hours, and I need as much feedback from my grassroots supporters as possible before then.**

Let me explain why:

In 2020, we protected our House Majority, took back the Senate, and put Joe Biden in the White House -- _all thanks to the input from grassroots supporters just like you._

But this year, Republicans are building a SURGE of momentum in their fight to crush our House Majority.

And if we want to stop them in their tracks, my Democrats and I will need your perspective and priorities once again to power our campaign.
**So please, will you complete my October Priorities Survey before midnight and let me know what 's on your mind?**
| [YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_)
---|---|---

Thanks,

Nancy
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45792751&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMTgzNTM4MgS2&l=14076025&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45792751&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMTgzNTM4MgS2&l=14076025&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25&recurring=true). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

Friends:

**I needed you to hear this from me personally:_I am running for re-election to continue representing the people of Iowa in the U.S Senate._ **
**_As we get the new campaign underway, Barbara and I want to share some of our favorite moments from previous campaigns. Check out the mash-up we made for you._** [](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=46770edd97ca4a8e83ad23fd7e006159&_e=SrhKLdLqxmqC2GBy2Q-JyaBxlD8GbdAhaqbYcP_07AvJdsJzQjlFtN5-WT0cuPm8JPz5FOlUpAFvAdTEImD-sB-QPlFaYok42iAf7Hg0yncEgKWF0ABsVXJiYqbhGfOf7FjFByZn4atg5omO2ApU0pGV8Qo7bkiTtSKFUyp6NZ8Lv70oXQ0MYj9DtONGGYo9lVHot9u7-UWddJqQY7_0xYo7_2mkB4lEqMtL6gaq29jPusdkWlGJvdYH36AuCF9Xjt0JA06mhNPvnnUHfHM7ycfa6gYHxkzIgMxdhHWE0paJjyViCWOq_QQ5g-KCPlGe5laAUOTpoulpxExD61SHXTRY0V-u6AQRFLtkyOzetGxWi53L2SsdiBXOGgR82KAo3hYSsZCncK3wtbEEEIoeNfSudKVEwzQ6Q3ZVZDdGscR_jDXIAzRBIPQbH8KTw4q-lcuZhJdNlb8kdzLlSOcgqxXQ7afFb2-TnnXdB9BR4zQ-Mfb4lKhenL_C3iELvDMg)

_Representing the people of Iowa is a great honor._ It is a privilege to listen to your concerns, and make our communities and our country stronger than ever. I am thankful for your support and want you to know that I never take that for granted. In these uncertain times of chaos and polarization, Iowa needs steady and effective leadership you can count on. We’ve accomplished a lot but there’s more work to do. Winning Iowa is key to taking back control of the United States Senate. We need to change course and get America back on track with Republican leadership.

As a farmer, I live life by a simple code: you keep working until the job is done. When you look at Washington today, you can see there is still a lot of work to do. I’m committed to making our country a better place for our kids and grandkids. I’m working as hard as ever.

**[I’m asking for your support so I can continue to bring common sense conservative values to Washington.](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=46770edd97ca4a8e83ad23fd7e006159&_e=SrhKLdLqxmqC2GBy2Q-JyaBxlD8GbdAhaqbYcP_07AvJdsJzQjlFtN5-WT0cuPm8JPz5FOlUpAFvAdTEImD-sB-QPlFaYok42iAf7Hg0yncEgKWF0ABsVXJiYqbhGfOf7FjFByZn4atg5omO2ApU0pGV8Qo7bkiTtSKFUyp6NZ8Lv70oXQ0MYj9DtONGGYo9lVHot9u7-UWddJqQY7_0xYo7_2mkB4lEqMtL6gaq29jPusdkWlGJvdYH36AuCF9Xjt0JA06mhNPvnnUHfHM7ycfa6gYHxkzIgMxdhHWE0paDxT7lBNA5toTUKE0xFX8_s85Rqd43fzkadNYqRcKAZP50CXm872kFgzTErwHpyuTBr8f1sShCU8HKWurO7PJj7G5UVUjDMVM52DkmOrSItr5gwd-Yn4a5popzmHHH4w-_ag-SHZAXWAgBsg-PZiIYf01HK2T9vS5ouQ5oORKMiQrxOFXxVzsH8-R-4pLXw2CC9ApUMT2wMxPto5P9hW2u)**

I work hard to earn your trust and Iowans count on me to do what I say I’ll do. That’s exactly what I’ve done, and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate. What you see is what you get.

So, I hope you will come running with me in this race. I know I’m geared up and ready to take on the Radical Left, are you?

clean_body: Please Open Immediately | Friends: I needed you to hear this from me personally:I am running for re-election to continue representing the people of Iowa in the U.S Senate. As we get the new campaign underway, Barbara and I want to share some of our favorite moments from previous campaigns. Check out the mash-up we made for you. Representing the people of Iowa is a great honor. It is a privilege to listen to your concerns, and make our communities and our country stronger than ever. I am thankful for your support and want you to know that I never take that for granted. In these uncertain times of chaos and polarization, Iowa needs steady and effective leadership you can count on. We’ve accomplished a lot but there’s more work to do. Winning Iowa is key to taking back control of the United States Senate. We need to change course and get America back on track with Republican leadership. As a farmer, I live life by a simple code: you keep working until the job is done. When you look at Washington today, you can see there is still a lot of work to do. I’m committed to making our country a better place for our kids and grandkids. I’m working as hard as ever. I work hard to earn your trust and Iowans count on me to do what I say I’ll do. That’s exactly what I’ve done, and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate. What you see is what you get. So, I hope you will come running with me in this race. I know I’m geared up and ready to take on the Radical Left, are you? | 2022 is about to be a big year. | "Grassley for Senate" | "Grassley for Senate" | "Grassley for Senate" | "Grassley for Senate" | "Grassley for Senate" | "Grassley for Senate" I love my work and I will always work harder than anyone on your behalf. Thank you and God Bless, Senator Chuck Grassley Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

subject: [You’re Invited]

body:
| 🍂 Oh my gourd! We have some cool trainings coming up...🍂
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNjM0NTE0MTI2LCJuYmYiOjE2MzQ1MTQxMjYsImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI4ODk0MjI3IiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiJoemIzbTAxZ2NhNXZoYWYwMXVwbCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vdHJhaW5kZW1vY3JhdHMub3JnL2V2ZW50cy8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEwMTcyMV9ydSZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.pcGFnkD6x-iQ6V2vjQLCSElSl5P2iLEJZ31p2B9P9es)
Peter — We know the month is already half way over, but that doesn’t mean we’re slowing down with October trainings!

Take a look at what we have coming down the pike next week: **⇨ First up is**[**How to Build a Political Campaign Digital Plan**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEwMTcyMV9ydSZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.t1aG3qdE9JUumao79e9ZkhA3YQPn_hoaFpDAAffYSOE)**on Tuesday, October 19 at 1pm ET.** It’s a fact — we live in a digital world. So your campaign needs to master the digital tools at your fingertips. Learning to create a digital plan is an essential part of your fundraising, volunteer recruitment, and even your GOTV strategy. Our team of experts will give you the tools to create a digital plan, track and elevate metrics, and show you what email tactics work best! | [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEwMTcyMV9ydSZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.t1aG3qdE9JUumao79e9ZkhA3YQPn_hoaFpDAAffYSOE)
---
**⇨ After that, we have**[**How to Engage Your Volunteer Community Online**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..zR8Mux4MnzpRhJG1-prSOhZqkZ0PuERnuWXed7_znd8)**on Wednesday, October 20 at 1pm ET.**
In this time of more remote work, building virtual community is everything.
During this training, you’ll learn how to build your digital infrastructure to connect with volunteers online. Building this community now can (and _will_) help your campaign in the long run!
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..zR8Mux4MnzpRhJG1-prSOhZqkZ0PuERnuWXed7_znd8)
---
**⇨ Later in the week, join NDTC Founder & CEO Kelly Dietrich for a **[**Kelly Q &A: Campaign Teams that Win**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..GEUQTW6qJHju12hNGUNlOzmvTMoLr7Py2b5e6UdSbRg)**on Thursday, October 21 at 1pm ET.**
2022 is right around the corner, and if you’re thinking about working on a campaign, it’s never too early to get ready!
In this interactive Q&A, Kelly will walk through strategies to elevate your campaign skills, take your burning questions, and discuss the upcoming application process for [**NDTC’s Staff Academy Cohort**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..u2Q1LKjfs-Kf9lHyXiCxrokuXQwt9v9pjD4FQTcr4LY).
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..GEUQTW6qJHju12hNGUNlOzmvTMoLr7Py2b5e6UdSbRg)
---
[**Interested in learning more about Staff Academy? This 10-week, personalized training program will prepare you to work full-time on real campaigns! Follow this link to join the waitlist and check out the FAQs.**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..u2Q1LKjfs-Kf9lHyXiCxrokuXQwt9v9pjD4FQTcr4LY)
[LEARN MORE →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..lMKnKc9rHdC8o7EcnIWCbl5vPoZCkk0_48E8321Abas)
---
**⇨ And finally, RSVP for**[**Digital Organizing: How to Engage and Activate Your Audience**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..8PHWeOMH_EiCHbsY-p_noyyMFAmF4sMXdAF_VtUtL8E)**on Friday, October 22 at 1pm ET.**
Knowing how to engage and activate your online audience isn’t easy. That’s why we’re here to help!
Friday’s training will cover how to create effective digital content, establishing an online presence, and composing digital calls to action.
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..8PHWeOMH_EiCHbsY-p_noyyMFAmF4sMXdAF_VtUtL8E)
---
See you soon!!
— NTDC Live Trainings Team

clean_body: | 🍂 Oh my gourd! We have some cool trainings coming up...🍂 Peter — We know the month is already half way over, but that doesn’t mean we’re slowing down with October trainings! Take a look at what we have coming down the pike next week: ⇨ First up is Tuesday, October 19 at 1pm ET. It’s a fact — we live in a digital world. So your campaign needs to master the digital tools at your fingertips. Learning to create a digital plan is an essential part of your fundraising, volunteer recruitment, and even your GOTV strategy. Our team of experts will give you the tools to create a digital plan, track and elevate metrics, and show you what email tactics work best! | ⇨ After that, we have Wednesday, October 20 at 1pm ET. In this time of more remote work, building virtual community is everything. During this training, you’ll learn how to build your digital infrastructure to connect with volunteers online. Building this community now can (and will) help your campaign in the long run! ⇨ Later in the week, join NDTC Founder & CEO Kelly Dietrich for a Thursday, October 21 at 1pm ET. 2022 is right around the corner, and if you’re thinking about working on a campaign, it’s never too early to get ready! In this interactive Q&A, Kelly will walk through strategies to elevate your campaign skills, take your burning questions, and discuss the upcoming application process for . ⇨ And finally, RSVP for Friday, October 22 at 1pm ET. Knowing how to engage and activate your online audience isn’t easy. That’s why we’re here to help! Friday’s training will cover how to create effective digital content, establishing an online presence, and composing digital calls to action. See you soon!! — NTDC Live Trainings Team | This message was sent to: | Connect with us on social media! | | | ---|---|--- | ---|--- Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats.org, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th Street NW, Suite 925, Washington, DC 20006
